perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a split-screen format; on the left, a man eats a green leaf with a loud crunch, and on the right, the main female creator in a blue tracksuit gestures while holding a small bowl. (2) The scene transitions to the female creator showing a clear plastic container of 'Ice Flower' vegetables, displaying their unique crystalline surface texture in a extreme close-up. (3) She proceeds to eat the vegetables, showing expressions of shock and amazement as she hears the crunch, looking directly at the camera with wide eyes. (4) Later, she dips the green vegetable into a container of white yogurt and eats it, giving a thumbs-up and nodding in approval.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, medium-tempo electronic background music starts immediately. Loud, sharp crunching sound effects are heard as the man in the video-in-video eats. (2) A female voice narrating in Mandarin enters, speaking in an excited and curious tone about purchasing the vegetable online. (3) During the eating sequences, the background music volume decreases slightly to emphasize the high-fidelity 'ASMR' style crunching sounds of the vegetable being bitten. (4) The music continues through to the end as the female narrator describes the taste and texture, ending with a final crunching sound.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '吃起來很像洋芋片？海外爆紅 冰花菜' (Tastes like potato chips? Overseas viral Ice Flower Vegetable) - Hook text at top. (2) '蔬菜還是洋芋片？' (Vegetable or potato chip?) - Functional question. (3) '真的很有冷凍過的樣子' (Really looks like it's been frozen) - Descriptive caption. (4) '(收到衝擊)' (Received a shock) - Emotional decorative text in parentheses. (5) '大家吃過冰花菜嗎？' (Has everyone eaten Ice Flower Vegetable?) - CTA text. (6) '而且根是空心！' (And the stem is hollow!) - Content observation text.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro Hook -> Product Unboxing -> Macro-shot Demo -> ASMR Tasting -> Dipping Sauce Variation -> Conclusion

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Observation -> Experimentation -> Final Verdict
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to verify the viral claim that the 'Ice Flower' vegetable has a texture similar to potato chips. It uses a combination of visual demonstration, macro-photography to show the plant's unique 'ice' crystals, and high-fidelity audio (ASMR) to prove the crunchiness, ultimately providing a culinary recommendation to eat it with yogurt.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator mentions buying it on Shopee as a consumer, but there is no explicit brand sponsorship indicated.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: The creator uses the persona 'Experimental Unnie' (實驗歐膩) and focuses on testing viral internet food trends.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video heavily relies on the ASMR 'crunch' appeal to engage viewers, a common tactic in short-form food content to trigger sensory satisfaction.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair waves at the camera while holding a South Korean passport in an airport setting. (2) Scene transitions to her in a restaurant where she is served a large bowl of cold soybean noodles; she eats them enthusiastically with close-ups of the food and her facial expressions. (3) She is seen in a Daiso store, pointing at cosmetic products on shelves and using a self-checkout kiosk. (4) The woman is outdoors on a path lined with cherry blossoms, wearing a pink cardigan and a mint-green quilted bag; she blows cherry blossom petals toward the camera. (5) In an indoor room, she holds up and demonstrates the features of the mint-green bag, including its texture, strap adjustment, and interior storage. (6) Finally, she is at a Korean BBQ restaurant, showing a wall of celebrity autographs and close-ups of beef ribs being grilled, then eating and giving a thumbs up.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy, upbeat pop music with a steady rhythmic beat begins and continues throughout the video. A cheerful female voice speaks in Mandarin Chinese with an enthusiastic and friendly tone. (2) Ambient restaurant sounds are heard, including the clinking of dishes and the sound of slurping noodles. (3) Electronic 'beep' sounds from a store's barcode scanner are prominent. (4) Subtle outdoor ambient noise is mixed with the ongoing BGM as she visits the cherry blossoms. (5) Clearer vocal narration dominates the indoor scene as she describes the bag, with the sound of the bag's fabric being touched. (6) The distinct sizzling sound of meat cooking on a metal grill is heard in the final restaurant segment.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '大家~' (Everyone~), '今天要回韓國' (Going back to Korea today), '有沒有推薦的韓國必吃餐廳?' (Any recommended must-eat restaurants in Korea?). (2) Functional Text: '1. 晉州家' (Jinju-jip) with address details and '一定要配 Kimchi' (Must pair with Kimchi). (3) Functional Text: '2. Daiso' and details about Korean cosmetics costing less than 110NT. (4) Functional Text: '3. 汝矣島 櫻花路' (Yeouido Cherry Blossom Road). (5) Decorative/Hook Text: '韓國 [CARLYN] COZY 經典雲朵包' (Korean CARLYN COZY Classic Cloud Bag) with celebrity mentions and promotion details: 'CARL602' discount code. (6) Functional Text: '3. 青瓦城' (Cheong Ki Wa Town) with address and food descriptions like '原味牛排骨' (Original beef ribs).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro at airport -> Food recommendation -> Shopping trip -> Sightseeing -> Detailed product review/promotion -> Final food recommendation.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a young Korean man in a black jacket and a black scarf standing on a sidewalk at night. He is looking at the camera with a curious expression. (2) As he speaks, a pop-up image of soy milk and fried dough sticks appears at the bottom of the screen, followed by his transition into a wide smile. (3) A second man wearing a blue puffer jacket enters the frame from the left. Both men stand together, putting their hands together in a prayer-like gesture of gratitude. (4) The two men laugh, wave at the camera, and repeatedly bow slightly while continuing to smile brightly against the backdrop of a brightly lit storefront.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A male voice starts speaking in a mix of Korean and Mandarin with a friendly tone. There is light ambient street noise. (2) An upbeat, medium-tempo electronic background music track enters as the man says 'Toh-sia' (Hokkien for thank you). (3) Sound effects like a subtle 'ding' occur when text/images appear. (4) Two male voices are heard laughing and repeating the phrase 'Toh-sia' several times until the audio fades out.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Hook text at the top: 'POV 剛學台語的韓國歐巴' (POV: Korean Oppa who just learned Taiwanese Hokkien) with a South Korean flag emoji. (2) Functional subtitles: '你說說剛學到的台語吧！' (Tell me the Taiwanese you just learned!) and '我可是有學到一句！' (I actually learned one sentence!). (3) Decorative/Pun text: '豆漿？...' (Soy milk?...) with a food image, followed by '原來是「多謝」' (Turns out it was 'thank you'). (4) Closing hook: '如果在台北看到韓國男人講多謝的話就是他們兩個囉' (If you see Korean men saying thank you in Taipei, it's these two).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Language Demo -> Pun reveal -> Duo interaction/Outro

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a split-screen view; the left side shows a person's hand holding a clear bag of four large Taiwanese macarons (Fu-fei), while the right side shows a young woman with long dark hair and a pink shirt looking curious. (2) The woman is then seen outdoors wearing a white shirt, walking past a bakery shelf and making a phone call on her smartphone with a frustrated facial expression. (3) Back indoors, the woman uses a Shopee app on her phone and then reveals a large black Kangol brand bag containing socks and a box of macarons. (4) She opens the 'FLUFFY' macaron box, picks up a beige macaron, and takes a large bite, her eyes widening in a delighted and surprised expression. (5) The final sequence features rapid cuts of promotional graphics for the Shopee 517 Foodie Festival, highlighting various snacks and a Kangol bag.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-tempo, upbeat electronic pop music starts immediately and remains consistent throughout the video. (2) A female voice speaks in an energetic, high-pitched tone in Chinese, narrating her experience. (3) During the phone call scene, sound effects of a phone ringing and a filtered voice representing the person on the other end are heard. (4) As the woman eats, exaggerated 'crunch' and 'munch' sound effects are inserted, followed by a 'ping' sound effect when she shows a thumbs-up gesture. (5) The music volume increases slightly at the end during the promotional call to action.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Hook Text: "只有台灣吃得到? 第一次吃台式馬卡龍😂" (Only available in Taiwan? First time eating Taiwanese macarons). (2) Functional Text: Subtitles tracking the dialogue about searching for the dessert at Taipei Main Station and mentions of "阿公 阿嬤" (Grandpa and Grandma). (3) Decorative Text: "實驗歐膩" (Unnie Lab) logo appearing on screen. (4) Promotional Text: "蝦皮 x 萬歲牌 x 小熊菓子 限量聯名款" (Shopee x Viva x Bear Bakery limited edition co-brand) and "5/13-6/18 獨家在蝦皮上架" (Exclusive on Shopee).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro/Hook -> Offline Search -> App Discovery -> Unboxing/Tasting -> Promotional Offer

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A female host stands on a busy street corner in Taipei, holding a microphone and gesturing to the camera while introducing the topic of hair washing. (2) The scene cuts between several female interviewees who share their personal routines, with the host reacting with smiles and expressive hand movements. (3) The host then presents a bottle of Milk Baobab shampoo to the interviewees, who smell it and show surprised, pleased expressions. (4) The setting shifts to a bedroom where the host sits on a bed holding the product, then to a bathroom where she is seen with her hair covered in thick white foam. (5) The video concludes with a back view of her long, smooth dark hair and a side-by-side shot of multiple product bottles on a counter.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, medium-tempo electronic background music plays throughout the street segment, accompanied by city ambient noise like distant traffic. The female host speaks in a high-pitched, enthusiastic, and friendly tone. (2) During the interviews, multiple female voices are heard responding with varied tones, some shy and others amused, while occasional giggle sound effects are added for emphasis. (3) The audio transitions to a cleaner, studio-like recording in the second half where the host's narration becomes more rhythmic and focused on product details. (4) Sound effects such as sparkling 'ding' sounds and soft bubble-popping noises are used during the product demonstration and texture reveal.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Main title hook: '台灣人出來說說！早上洗頭派 VS 晚上洗頭派' (Taiwanese come speak! Morning vs Night wash). (2) Functional text identifies speakers as '韓國人' (Korean) and '台灣人' (Taiwanese). (3) Decorative/Hook text: '嚇到到' (Shocked), '很香' (Very fragrant), and 'Milk Baobab 白色香洗髮精' (White Musk Shampoo). (4) Product feature labels: '弱酸性配方' (Weak acidity formula), 'Before/After', and '真的超加分' (Really adds points).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Street Interview -> Product Revelation -> Personal Demo -> Feature Highlight -> Final Results

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a close-up of a young man in a black leather jacket standing in a crowded night market at night. He is eating a small snack and smiling at the camera. (2) There is a sudden cut to him gesturing excitedly with his hands, appearing to boast or challenge something. (3) He is then shown sitting at a metal table in an outdoor stall, with a plate of stinky tofu in front of him. A friend in a gray shirt laughs and walks away from the frame. (4) The main character uses chopsticks to eat the tofu, showing a surprised and slightly overwhelmed expression. (5) Another young man in a plaid shirt is shown being hand-fed a piece of tofu; he reacts with an exaggerated expression of shock/pleasure, closing his eyes. (6) A final shot shows a large batch of stinky tofu frying in deep oil within a wire basket.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, upbeat electronic background music starts immediately. A male voice speaks excitedly in a mix of Mandarin and Korean. (2) Sound effects including a 'ping' and cartoonish laughter are heard as the scene cuts. (3) Ambient noise of a busy night market, including chatter and the clinking of dishes, is present throughout. (4) The vocals maintain a high energy level with frequent exclamations and laughter. (5) The sound of oil sizzling is audible during the final shot of the tofu frying.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: 'POV 小看臭豆腐的韓國歐巴' (Korean Oppa who looked down on stinky tofu) appears at the top. '今天要把幾盤臭豆腐？' (How many plates of stinky tofu today?) with Korean translation below. (2) Decorative/Hook Text: '100盤!' (100 plates!) appears in large red font with an impact sound effect. (3) Effect Text: '(還沒吃先瘋掉)' (Going crazy before eating), '朋友：我先走囉' (Friend: I'm leaving first), and '哈哈哈' (Hahaha) appear as variety-show style captions. (4) Functional Text: '就是麻辣豆腐呀!' perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A female celebrity with long dark hair, wearing a yellow strawberry t-shirt and jeans, sits in a studio environment with 'CAPSULE' and 'YouTube' branding on the shelves behind her. An interviewer's hands are seen pulling items from a brown paper bag. (2) Two boxes that look like instant noodle packaging (labeled Beef Noodles) are presented to the woman. She looks at them with a confused and curious expression. (3) The woman realizes the items are actually facial masks; she reacts with intense laughter, wide eyes, and gestures toward her face. The camera cuts between her laughing and close-ups of the product packaging.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, energetic electronic background music begins. A high-pitched female voice (the interviewer) speaks excitedly in Mandarin. (2) The background music continues as the celebrity speaks in a mix of Korean and Mandarin, sounding confused and then surprised. (3) Loud, synchronous laughter from two women dominates the audio track. Occasional cartoon-style sound effects (SFX) such as pops and dings punctuate the reaction phases.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: 'Taiwan Gifts for Korean star' and 'Solar' appear as recurring titles. (2) Hook Text: '頌樂女神' (Solar Goddess) with heart-eyes emoji, and '猜猜看是什麼呢？' (Guess what it is?). (3) Effect Text: '牛肉麵' (Beef Noodles), '是面膜！' (It's a mask!), and '笑到翻過去' (Laughing so hard I'm turning over).

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a split-screen: an inset video shows a woman eating raw green onions while the main subject, a young woman in a pink top and a white flower-patterned knitted hat, reacts with curiosity. (2) The main subject presents a large green onion, cuts the roots, and washes it. (3) She mixes Kiri cream cheese with honey in a glass bowl. (4) She crushes a bag of Lay's chips and uses scissors to cut up 'meat paper' into small pieces. (5) She spreads the cream cheese mixture onto a green onion stalk using a spoon. (6) She dips the coated onion into the mix of crushed chips and meat paper. (7) She takes a large bite, her eyes widen, and she gives a thumbs-up while chewing. (8) At the end, she fans her mouth, reacting to the spicy/pungent kick of the raw onion.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-tempo, rhythmic background music with a consistent electronic beat starts immediately. (2) A cheerful, high-pitched female voice speaks Mandarin Chinese, explaining the steps and expressing excitement. (3) Prominent sound effects (SFX) include the crinkle of a chip bag being crushed and a sharp 'crunch' sound when she bites into the onion. (4) The audio maintains a high vocal-to-music ratio throughout, ending with the sound of the creator expressing 'whoo' due to the spiciness.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '美國爆紅大蔥沙拉?!' (Hook/Shocked tone). (2) '美國流行生吃「大蔥」？' (Inquisitive tone). (3) '要製作 Cream起司醬！' (Functional/Instructional). (4) '這是我最愛吃的肉紙' (Endorsement/Personal preference). (5) '(咬的聲音好療癒)' (ASMR hook/Playful). (6) '好好吃' (Emotional/Review). (7) '後面爆辣' (Humorous/Reaction).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro/Reaction -> Ingredient Preparation -> Assembly -> Tasting/Final Verdict

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a close-up POV shot of a woman with long brown hair appearing to hyperventilate with excitement, covering her mouth with her hand. A friend is seen in the background holding a phone. (2) The scene cuts to a POV shot of the woman walking briskly through a modern shopping mall towards an Olive Young store entrance. (3) Chronological shots show her hands quickly picking up skincare and makeup products, including a cushion foundation and serum tubes, and placing them into a grey mesh basket. (4) A close-up shows the woman's face looking extremely determined and serious while browsing. (5) The camera captures the items being processed and bagged at the cashier's counter. (6) The video ends with her walking out of the mall, holding a full Olive Young shopping bag, looking relieved and happy.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, upbeat electronic dance music (EDM) starts immediately and remains constant throughout the video. (2) Faint ambient sounds of a bustling shopping mall and the rustle of shopping bags are heard underneath the music. (3) A distinct electronic beep sound occurs during the middle of the video, synchronized with the scanning of products at a register. (4) No human vocals are detected throughout the entire duration.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) 'POV 🇰🇷 在韓國過度換氣的女生' (POV: A girl hyperventilating in Korea) appears as the opening hook. perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a woman in a pink top taking a selfie in a cafe setting, showing a cheerful expression. (2) It transitions to a series of comedic 'fails': a close-up of lipstick on her teeth, a shot of a makeup puff falling onto a wooden floor, and a scene where her hair is messy and sticking to her face outdoors. (3) The main character then appears in a yellow shirt against a cityscape background with the Taipei 101 tower visible, speaking directly to the camera with expressive hand gestures. (4) Close-up shots show the 'La glow' skincare product bottle and the white cream texture being dispensed and rubbed onto a hand, where it turns into watery droplets. (5) Side-by-side 'before' and 'after' skin comparisons are shown. (6) The woman continues her presentation, holding the product and smiling enthusiastically until the end.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, fast-paced electronic background music with a strong rhythmic beat begins. (2) A high-pitched, energetic female voice narrates in Mandarin Chinese, maintaining a friendly and persuasive tone. (3) Occasional cartoonish sound effects (pops and dings) play in sync with on-screen text appearances. (4) The music remains constant throughout, providing a lively atmosphere behind the continuous narration.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Decorative Hook: 'POV. 女生爆氣瞬間Top3' (Top 3 moments that make girls angry) at the top. (2) Decorative Caption: '(認真在自拍中)' (Seriously taking a selfie). (3) List Text: 'TOP3: 牙齒被沾到唇彩的時候' (Top 3: When lipstick gets on teeth), 'TOP2: 粉撲掉地上的時候' (Top 2: When the powder puff falls on the floor), 'TOP1: 一出門頭髮黏在臉上' (Top 1: Hair sticking to the face as soon as you go out). (4) Functional Text: Comprehensive subtitles translating the Mandarin narration regarding skincare. (5) Brand Text: 'La glow 煥齡修護雪凝乳' (La glow Advanced Water Power Emulsion) in a stylized font.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair and a white sweatshirt sits in front of a blue couch, opening a large white plastic container of tteokbokki (spicy rice cakes) covered in melted cheese. (2) She uses chopsticks to stir the cheese-covered rice cakes and then pours a bag of crispy fried dumplings into the container. (3) She begins eating, taking large bites of the rice cakes, showing the long stretches of cheese, and displaying various ingredients like sausages, wide glass noodles (fenmaozi), and fish cakes to the camera. (4) Throughout the video, she maintains an enthusiastic and happy facial expression, nodding and smiling as she eats. (5) Close-ups show individual ingredients: a yellow pickled radish, a quail egg, and a spoonful of tteokbokki with sauce.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A playful, upbeat, and slightly repetitive synth-pop BGM starts immediately and continues throughout the video. No speaking is heard. (2) Occasional sound effects (SFX) like light 'dings' and cartoon-style sound effects emphasize text appearances and actions like opening the lid. (3) Subtle chewing and slurping sounds are heard, though they are partially masked by the background music. (4) The audio concludes with a final cheerful musical phrase as the video ends.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '엽기떡볶이 / 獵奇辣炒年糕' (Yupgi Tteokbokki / Mysterious Spicy Rice Cake). (2) '🇰🇷韓國TOP3連鎖 辣炒年糕中一個!' (One of Korea's TOP 3 chain spicy rice cakes!). (3) '要加一些配料喔' (Need to add some toppings). (4) '떡볶이 / 辣炒年糕' (Tteokbokki / Spicy Rice Cake). (5) '還可以選擇辣度! 也有幾乎不辣的口味' (You can also choose the spiciness! There are also almost non-spicy flavors). (6) '소세지 / 香腸' (Sausage). (7) '분모자 / 粉耗子' (Fenmaozi - wide glass noodles). (8) '這是超Q超滑的粉條' (This is a very chewy and smooth noodle). (9) '近期韓國人吃辣炒年糕時一定會加的配料~ 大家也可以加這個看看喔' (A topping Koreans must add when eating tteokbokki recently~ Everyone should try adding this too). (10) '오뎅 / 魚板' (Fish cake). (11) '바삭치즈만두 / 酥脆起司煎餃' (Crispy cheese dumplings). (12) '裡面是甜甜的起司奶油餡喔 沒有什麼臭臭的味道' (Inside is a sweet cheese cream filling; it doesn't have any bad smell). (13) '配醃黃蘿蔔真的很搭配' (It really goes well with pickled yellow radish). (14) '메추리알 / 鵪鶉蛋' (Quail egg). (15) '這樣用湯匙挖著吃也超好吃的啦' (It's also super delicious to eat it by scooping it with a spoon like this). (16) '我的靈魂食物就是辣炒年糕啦~! 你們的靈魂食物是什麼呢?' (My soul food is tteokbokki~! What is your soul food?).

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a young woman wearing a green tracksuit with the number 56, holding a pink rubber ball with a black marker signature. (2) The scene cuts to various shots of a large outdoor crowd at night, many of whom are also wearing green and white tracksuits. (3) Clips show multiple actors from the series 'Squid Game' appearing on a large stage with vibrant pink and green lighting and a 'Squid Game' backdrop. (4) The woman is shown filming herself with her phone and later interacting with her smartphone screen, searching for information. (5) Screen captures of ChatGPT and a social media app (Threads) are displayed as she investigates the signature. (6) The video concludes with a close-up of the signed ball and a photo of actor Park Hae-soo.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, energetic electronic background music starts immediately along with a high-pitched, excited female voice narrating in Mandarin. (2) Ambient sounds of a large, cheering crowd and the booming voice of a male announcer speaking Korean from a stage PA system are layered in. (3) The melody of the 'Red Light, Green Light' song from the series is heard faintly during the stage clips. (4) Short digital sound effects (SFX) such as 'pings' and 'swishes' accompany the appearance of text overlays and transitions. (5) The narration continues throughout, maintaining a fast-paced and inquisitive tone.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '需要大家的幫忙！！這到底是《魷魚遊戲》誰的簽名球' - Hook text asking for help identifying a signature on a ball. (2) 'Netflix VIP行程第三天' - Functional text explaining it's the third day of a Netflix VIP trip. (3) '朴圭瑛 · 魏化儁', '金施恩 · 朴成焄', '李瑜美 · 鄭好娟', '任時完 · 曹柔理', '李政宰', '李炳憲' - Functional labels identifying various Korean actors on stage. (4) 'GPT也找不到' - Decorative text showing frustration that AI couldn't identify the signature. (5) '結論是好像是他！朴海秀！！！' - Concluding text identifying the signer as Park Hae-soo.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Event Highlight -> Investigative Process -> Final Discovery

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a vertical split-screen featuring the same woman in two different outfits (purple jacket on the left, grey polo on the right), demonstrating Korean pronunciation. (2) The scene transitions to a modern, minimalist retail store with curved wooden fixtures and white floors. The woman, now in a grey polo and green cargo shorts, walks through the store and interacts with various 'cloud-style' quilted bags. (3) She showcases a silver 'Mellow Bag' backpack, demonstrating its texture, zippers, and how it looks when worn. (4) She displays other bag styles like the 'Kira' bag in different colors. (5) The final sequence shows her at a promotional photo booth and signing a custom newspaper, followed by her waving to the camera in front of the store logo.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, contemporary pop background music with a steady electronic beat begins. A female voice is heard mimicking two distinct Korean regional accents (Seoul and Busan), with the Busan accent sounding more rhythmic and sharp. (2) Continuous female narration starts as the background music maintains a consistent volume. The narrator speaks in a friendly, enthusiastic, and informative tone. (3) Occasional subtle sound effects accompany text transitions. (4) The music continues as the sole acoustic background until the end, with no significant ambient store noise detected.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Hook Text: '首爾 VS 釜山 發音差異' (Seoul vs Busan Pronunciation Differences) appearing at the top. (2) Functional Text: '1. 包包', '2. 肩包', '3. 斜挎包' with Korean translations and phonetic guides. (3) Narrative Text: '韓國明星愛用的 Carlyn 雲朵包' (Carlyn cloud bags loved by Korean stars) and '這次我來到 Carlyn 大巨蛋旗艦店' (This time I came to the Carlyn Big Dome flagship store). (4) Descriptive Text: '2025 SS Mellow Bag' and 'Kira包'. (5) Promotional Text: 'Grand Open Event' and 'IG 限時動態打卡' (IG story check-in) describing event details.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro Comparison -> Store Tour -> Product Feature -> Event Promotion -> Outro

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long wavy brown hair, wearing a red and white striped polo shirt, is seen in a close-up holding a large clear plastic bowl containing bibim naengmyeon (Korean spicy cold noodles) topped with an egg and radish. She looks directly at the camera and speaks with high energy. (2) She presents a white foam tray with a fried tonkatsu (pork cutlet) and then momentarily stands up to go to the back of the room to get something. (3) She returns and begins the eating process, first picking up the hard-boiled egg with her chopsticks and eating it. (4) She shows the noodles to the camera, mixes them, and takes a large bite, followed by a bite of the tonkatsu. (5) She picks up a small white cup containing clear broth, takes a drink, and then pours the broth into her noodle bowl. (6) She mixes the noodles again and continues eating the combined dish with visible enjoyment and expressive facial reactions.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a high-pitched, enthusiastic female voice speaking Mandarin Chinese. Upbeat, rhythmic K-pop style background music with a strong electronic beat and synthesizer melody plays. (2) As the subject starts eating, the music continues at a steady volume, and the sounds of slurping and chewing are clearly audible. (3) The female narrator's voice remains energetic, providing step-by-step instructions. (4) The sound of liquid being poured into the plastic bowl is heard during the transition to the final eating stage. (5) The music stays consistent until the end of the clip.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Hook Text: '台灣人絕對不知道的 🇰🇷韓國冷麵吃法 🍜' (Taiwanese people definitely don't know the Korean cold noodle eating method). (2) Instructional Text: '1. 韓國人不會只吃麵，一定會配肉類' (Koreans don't just eat noodles; they must pair it with meat). (3) Variety Text: '???' (indicating surprise or a question). (4) Instructional Text: '2. 不會直接拌一拌' (Won't just mix it directly). (5) Instructional Text: '3. 先吃雞蛋讓胃準備' (Eat the egg first to prepare the stomach). (6) Instructional Text: '4. 配蘿蔔片一起吃' (Eat with radish slices). (7) Emotional Text: '超馬西搜 ❤️❤️❤️' (So delicious) and '好吃到升天 😇' (So good it's heavenly). (8) Instructional Text: '5. 喝一口水冷麵高湯' (Take a sip of the cold noodle broth). (9) Instructional Text: '6. 加水冷麵高湯 由不同型態享受 😋' (Add cold noodle broth to enjoy a different form).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: The video follows a structured sequence: Intro Hook -> Step-by-step Demonstration -> Tasting/Reaction -> Conclusion.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman stands next to a light blue GoShare electric scooter against a concrete wall background. She opens the scooter's storage compartment and lifts out a light blue helmet. (2) She brings the helmet close to her nose, smells it, and immediately makes a disgusted facial expression, covering her mouth with her hand. (3) A close-up shot shows the interior of the helmet with pink flower stickers digitally overlaid. (4) She holds up a white disposable hairnet and stretches it between her hands. (5) She puts the white hairnet on her head, covering her hair completely while looking seriously at the camera. (6) She puts the light blue helmet on over the hairnet, looking at the camera with a squinted, slightly teary-eyed expression of relief.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo electronic pop music with a repetitive rhythmic beat starts immediately. (2) High-pitched 'pop' and 'sparkle' sound effects (SFX) are heard at intervals, synchronizing with the appearance of text and visual stickers. (3) No spoken vocals are detected throughout the video; the audio track is purely instrumental and SFX-driven.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) 'POV 台灣夏天最可怕的瞬間' (POV: The most terrifying moment of summer in Taiwan) - Decorative hook text at the top of the screen throughout the video. (2) '（感動）' (Moved/Touched) - Decorative emotional caption appearing when she finds the hairnet. (3) 'GoShare' and 'Gogoro' - Functional brand text appearing on the scooter body and the helmet.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Problem (Smelly helmet) -> Solution (Finding a hairnet) -> Result (Wearing the helmet).

It serves as both entertainment for locals and an implicit endorsement of the hygiene standards of the GoShare service.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video prominently features the GoShare scooter and helmet, focusing on the hygiene solution (hairnet) provided by the service.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with wavy brown hair wearing a black-and-white striped shirt speaks directly to the camera with expressive facial movements, holding a yellow plush dog. (2) The scene shifts to show her sitting on a bed alongside another woman in a white shirt; they engage in a series of fast-paced debates, gesturing toward each other and the camera while various graphics (food, animals, movie posters) overlay the screen. (3) The women are seen eating from an orange snack bag, laughing and reacting to each other's opinions with wide eyes and hand gestures. (4) The video concludes with both women smiling broadly and giving thumbs-up gestures to the camera.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A high-pitched and enthusiastic female voice speaks in Mandarin, accompanied by a light, upbeat instrumental background track. (2) A second female voice joins in, creating a lively back-and-forth dialogue filled with frequent laughter and occasional loud exclamations. (3) The soundscape is punctuated by various sound effects (SFX) such as 'ding' sounds for correct/match points, dramatic musical cues for 'scary' or 'sad' topics, and the sound of a snack bag crinkling. (4) The voices and music maintain a consistent energy until the final seconds where the voices merge into shared laughter and the music fades.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: Traditional Chinese subtitles translate the spoken dialogue throughout the video. (2) Decorative/Hook Text: Top-aligned hook reads 'POV 身邊一定會有這種朋友' (POV: There's definitely a friend like this around) with a rolling-eyes emoji. (3) Category Headers: Text overlays like '拌滷肉飯 VS 不拌滷肉飯' (Mix braised pork rice vs don't mix), '花生 VS 芝麻' (Peanuts vs Sesame), and others define the debate topics with a humorous, variety-show tone.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young Asian female creator with long brown hair smiles at the camera while holding a passport and ticket in a hallway. (2) Scene shifts to her inside an airplane showing a flight meal and then her passport. (3) Upon landing, she walks through a terminal and is met by a man in a white shirt holding a Netflix sign next to her luggage. (4) She enters a luxury black van, then arrives at the Fairmont Ambassador Seoul, which has staff dressed in red Squid Game outfits. (5) She tours a luxury hotel suite with two beds, showing various gift packs and snacks on the bed. (6) She visits a convenience store aisle filled with instant noodles. (7) She changes into a floral dress and dines at 'Dahlia Dining', showing close-ups of gourmet dishes and drinking wine. (8) The video ends with her speaking directly to the camera in various outfits, using hand gestures to engage the audience.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Energetic, upbeat pop music with a fast tempo starts. A high-pitched, excited female voice speaks in Mandarin. (2) Occasional 'ding' and cash register sound effects occur when price tags appear on screen. (3) The female voice continues a continuous narration over the scenes of travel and hotel arrival. (4) Background ambient noise of a busy airport and restaurant chatter is briefly audible but suppressed by the BGM. (5) At the end, the creator switches to speaking Korean with a friendly and polite tone before returning to Mandarin for the closing call to action.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: 'NETFLIX 招待我回家 24小時能花多少?' (Netflix invited me home, how much can I spend in 24 hours?) as a hook title. (2) Decorative Text: Prices like '$14,000NT', '$800NT', '$10,700NT/晚', and '$4,000NT/桌' appearing to track expenses. (3) Functional Text: Subtitles in Traditional Chinese translating the creator's narration about the trip and the 'Squid Game' themed experience. (4) Decorative Text: '**有抽獎**' (There is a giveaway) and '總金額答案會在下一集公佈' (The total amount answer will be announced in the next episode) to create engagement.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Travel Logistics -> Hotel Experience -> Gourmet Dining -> Engagement/Outro

(4) She demonstrates applying a lip tint from a large 'dasique' palette and shows off various snacks and supplements like 'Foodology' and 'Vive lab' hair products. (5) The video ends with a camera pan across the now-chaotic room filled with empty boxes and products, with the creator looking overwhelmed.

(2) A young female voice speaks with high energy and an enthusiastic tone throughout the video, primarily in Mandarin with some Korean phrases. (3) Synchronized sound effects (SFX) such as 'bling' sounds and 'pop' noises occur whenever a new product is revealed or highlighted. (4) Audible crunching sounds are heard when she bites into a cookie, along with the rustling of plastic and cardboard packaging.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long brown hair, wearing a light grey cardigan, stands outside the 'nyunyu WHOLESALE' store in Gangnam, holding a large white shopping bag and smiling excitedly. (2) She enters the store, which features dark walls lined with thousands of accessories like hairbands, jewelry, and hats. (3) She picks up several items sequentially, including a white Y2K style bag with red trim, a light blue gathered bag, black socks with white bows, a large white hair clip, and a pearl necklace, showing the price tags to the camera with surprised and happy expressions. (4) The camera pans across shelves of keychains and plush toys before showing her placing her items into a shopping basket. (5) She concludes at a self-checkout kiosk showing a total of 94,000 KRW, then walks up a staircase holding her full shopping bag.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, mid-tempo lo-fi background music starts. A high-pitched, excited female voice introduces the store in Mandarin. (2) The soundscape shifts to include clear dialogue between two females as they browse; they discuss price predictions followed by reactions like 'Wow' and 'Unbelievable'. (3) Intermittent digital sound effects (SFX) such as 'dings' and 'bling' noises play whenever a price is revealed on screen. (4) Subtle ambient noise of a busy retail environment, including distant chatter and the rustling of bags, is audible beneath the music. (5) The music continues steadily until the end of the video, where the main speaker gives a concluding recommendation.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) POV: 🇰🇷韓國nyunyu有那麼好買？ (POV: Is Korea's nyunyu that easy to buy?) - Hook text. (2) (韓國人自己也第一次去) (Even Koreans go for the first time) - Contextual detail. (3) 1.Y2K包包 價格：??? (1. Y2K Bag Price: ???) - Functional list item. (4) 不超過18000韓幣，我會買！ (If it doesn't exceed 18,000 KRW, I'll buy it!) - Narrative hook. (5) 85NT🩷 韓幣4000KRW - Price comparison text with emotional emoji. (6) 真的很值得來逛逛看看~ (It's really worth coming to take a look~) - Concluding recommendation.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman is seen eating a snack while a split-screen shows coffee being poured into a bowl of instant noodles. (2) The woman holds up a bowl of spicy beef ramen and a bottle of Cafe Plaza coffee, introducing the ingredients. (3) She prepares the dish by pouring hot water into the ramen, followed by coffee and milk. (4) She stirs the mixture and takes a large bite, exhibiting expressions of shock and then intense satisfaction. (5) She holds up two variations of the Cafe Plaza coffee bottles (white and blue) while speaking to the camera. (6) She is seen eating a chocolate roll cake and drinking the coffee, showing how well they pair. (7) The video ends with her eating the ramen with great appetite.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) An upbeat, jaunty acoustic-pop background music track starts and plays throughout. (2) A female voice begins speaking in an energetic, high-pitched Mandarin tone, narrating the process. (3) Sound effects like 'ding', 'pop', and 'slurping' noises are heard as text overlays appear and the character eats. (4) The music remains consistent in volume as the speaker transitions into a promotional message about a store discount.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '韓網上已經超有名！！ 韓國泡麵加咖啡牛奶' (Super famous on Korean internet!! Korean ramen plus coffee milk) - Hook text. (2) '準備辣牛肉泡麵' (Prepare spicy beef ramen) - Functional instruction. (3) '加！ 加牛奶' (Add! Add milk) - Functional instruction. (4) '（收到衝擊） 真假' (Shocked. Really?) - Decorative/Emotional text. (5) '變成高級料理的感覺！' (Feels like high-end cuisine!) - Hook/Review text. (6) '咖啡廣場 奶香特調咖啡 / 調合式冰咖啡' (Cafe Plaza Milk Coffee / Blended Ice Coffee) - Functional product names. (7) '2瓶49元' (2 bottles for 49 NTD) - Promotional functional text.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A woman with long dark hair sits in front of a massive pile of green Ice Plants. She picks up a cluster, showing it to the camera while wearing a clear plastic glove. (2) She proceeds to eat the plant plain, highlighting its crunchy texture. (3) She then moves through a series of food pairings: she pours Thousand Island dressing over a leaf, eats it, and displays a rating; she prepares a bowl of Wei Lih Men instant noodles with an egg yolk and ice plants, takes a large bite, and shows a rating; she squeezes condensed milk onto a leaf; she adds Sriracha sauce; and finally, she eats it with a piece of fried chicken. (4) Throughout the video, she uses exaggerated facial expressions to convey enjoyment or surprise at the flavors. (5) The video ends with her holding a drumstick and gesturing toward the camera.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, fast-paced electronic background music plays continuously throughout. (2) A female voice speaks in a friendly, high-pitched, and excited tone, narrating the experience in Chinese. (3) Very loud and crisp crunching sound effects (ASMR style) are heard every time she bites into the ice plants. (4) The audio maintains a high vocal ratio, though the background music and the sound of eating are equally prominent. (5) The soundscape transitions smoothly between different food trials without any abrupt breaks.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: 'Ice Plants / 冰花菜' appears at the start to identify the food. (2) Decorative/Hook Text: '這個在韓國要等1個月' (Need to wait 1 month in Korea) and '聲音本來就這樣' (The sound is naturally like this) provide context and hook the viewer. (3) Product Labels: '千島醬' (Thousand Island), '維力炸醬麵' (Wei Lih Men noodles), '煉乳' (Condensed milk), '是拉差' (Sriracha), '韓式炸雞' (Fried chicken) appear to label each pairing. (4) Rating Text: Star-based scores like '8.5/10' and '9/10' are overlayed after each taste test. (5) Closing Hook: '大家最想吃看看哪一個組合呢?!' (Which combination do you want to try most?) encourages viewer interaction.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a vertical split screen showing two young women eating a sticky, stretchy dessert; one on the left uses a microphone for ASMR. (3) She tears open the inner white packaging, revealing a golden-brown wafer dessert that is highly sticky and stuck to the paper. (4) She pulls the two halves of the dessert apart, demonstrating an extremely high elasticity where the internal syrup forms a dense, translucent web of threads. (5) She takes a bite and continues talking, showing close-ups of the sticky texture on her lips and hands, ending with a humorous demonstration of how the snack sticks to her skin.

(2) A cheerful, high-pitched female voice-over in Mandarin enters, providing a fast-paced commentary on the product's popularity and availability. (3) Throughout the middle section, the upbeat BGM remains constant, layered with occasional cartoonish sound effects like pops and bells that synchronize with text appearing on screen. (4) The final segment features the same vocal tone discussing the taste and the 'unexpected advantage' of the snack, concluding with the music fading out.

(2) Decorative Text: 'Like a spider web?' with a question mark sticker, and 'Honey Jelly Monaka' in Korean and Chinese. (3) Content/Tone Text: 'Problem 1', 'Problem 2' hooks, 'Finished' (完蛋) for a sticky mess, 'It really stretches like a spider web', and 'Unexpected advantage: Tanghulu lips' with a kiss emoji.

(4) The video ends with a mix of conversational speech and the recurring upbeat BGM.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) 'POV 被留言氣到崩潰的韓國人' (POV: A Korean person collapsing from being angry at comments) - Hook text. (2) '汗不汗？' (Sweaty or not?) - Emphasis text. (3) '(幸福)' (Happiness), '(已成為多汗的女子)' (Has become a sweaty woman), '(真不理解😂)' (Really don't understand) - Decorative/Emotional variety-show style captions. (4) '剛起床就用冰肌凍膜' (Using ice skin mask right after waking up) - Functional product description. (5) '韓國保養品的話我都在Line群組分享喔！！' (I share Korean skincare in my Line group!!) - Call to action.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Hook (Angry Reaction) -> Context (Reading Comments) -> Solution (Product Application) -> Outro (CTA)

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video is a live-action vlog. It opens with a split-screen featuring other influencers eating green mangoes alongside the main female creator holding yellow mangoes. (2) She presents a tray of sliced green mangoes, tastes one plain, and reacts with a delighted facial expression and a thumbs up. (3) She then proceeds to mix a dark sauce in a measuring cup, adding liquid and powdered ingredients. (4) The scene transitions to the creator pouring the chunky sauce over sliced mangoes and two whole yellow mangoes on a large platter. (5) She consumes the mangoes with high-energy reactions, including wide eyes and frequent nodding to indicate taste. (6) She demonstrates a 'trick' to remove the pit from a whole mango using her teeth and then uses a spoon to eat the pulp from the skin. (7) The video ends with her showing a successful bite of the mango pulp and encouraging the viewer.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) An upbeat, high-tempo electronic remix of a pop song ('Barbie Girl') plays continuously throughout. (2) A high-pitched, enthusiastic female voice provides continuous narration in Mandarin Chinese. (3) Sharp 'ding' and 'pop' sound effects are used to highlight text transitions and scene cuts. (4) A comical 'fail' sound effect (slide whistle/trombone) plays at 0:53 when she comments on the yellow mango. (5) Crunchy eating sounds (ASMR-lite) are audible during the tasting phases.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Hook Text: '海外網紅爆紅吃法' (Overseas influencer viral eating method) and '連皮一起吃的青芒果' (Green mango eaten with skin) are pinned at the top for most of the video. (2) Decorative/Effect Text: '實驗歐膩' (Experiment Unnie) and emotional captions like '超爆好吃' (Extremely delicious) with crying-face emojis. (3) Functional Text: Standard subtitles follow the narration, and numbered steps (1, 2, 3, 4) appear during the pit-removal tutorial.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro Hook -> Sauce Preparation -> Tasting & Reaction -> Special Technique Tutorial

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a split screen; on the left, a woman with curly hair is eating a snack, and on the right, the main character, a young woman with long dark hair in a white tank top, is holding a red packet. (2) The scene shifts to the main character searching on a laptop, showing screens of various chocolate snacks. (3) She excitedly holds up two boxes of chocolate sticks (Orange and Mint flavors). (4) She opens the orange box and shows the thin chocolate sticks to the camera. (5) She tastes the orange chocolate stick, showing a close-up of the interior, then shows a clip of someone else's chocolate stick having liquid inside. (6) She opens the mint box, smells it with a surprised expression, and then eats multiple sticks, making exaggerated chewing motions. (7) She ends by holding the mint chocolate box and gesturing towards the camera.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, upbeat electronic music begins immediately. A female voice provides narration in a lively, expressive tone. (2) Sounds of mouse clicks and rapid speech as she describes her search. (3) Loud sound effects (SFX) of boxes being tapped and opened. (4) Distinct, amplified crunchy sounds (ASMR style) as she bites into the chocolate sticks. (5) The music continues at a steady volume while she expresses disappointment about the lack of juice inside. (6) Another set of loud crunching sounds during the second tasting. (7) The music and narration conclude with a final question and upbeat notes.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) 海外爆紅! 只有台灣沒有 (Overseas viral! Only Taiwan doesn't have it) - Hook, excited tone. (2) 可以喝果汁的巧克力棒 (Chocolate sticks you can drink juice from) - Descriptive. (3) 在韓國也爆紅 (Also viral in Korea) - Informative. (4) 瘋狂搜尋 (Searching frantically) - Action-oriented. (5) 找到很相似的東西! (Found something very similar!) - Triumphant. (6) 究竟會一樣嗎? (Will it be the same?) - Questioning. (7) 裡面沒有果汁!!! (There's no juice inside!!!) - Disappointed. (8) 喜歡吃薄荷巧克力的人一定要吃看看! (People who like mint chocolate must try this!) - Recommendation.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Hook (Viral Snack) -> Quest (Searching and Buying) -> Review (Tasting and Comparing) -> Recommendation.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman appears with a thick white cream mask covering her face, holding a bowl containing blue powder and a spatula, speaking directly to the camera. (4) Mechanical clicking sounds of a pump bottle being used are audible. (5) The sound of the mask being peeled from the skin (a soft tearing/plastic sound) is heard towards the end. (6) The video ends with a final call to action in a cheery tone.

(4) Functional Text: '沒什麼高級保養成分!' (No high-end skincare ingredients!) - Emphasis. (5) Hook Text: '現在🇰🇷韓國女生都在用 奶霜軟膜' (Now Korean girls use cream soft masks) - Trend alert. (6) Functional Text: 'Oable AB軟膜', '不用加水', '20次' - Product details. (7) Effect Text: '超Q彈', '透亮' - Result description. (8) CTA Text: '爭取到台灣最低價💖', '我的IG主頁裡面連結' - Promotional offer and instructions.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a woman in a car passenger seat holding a Hello Kitty makeup bag; she takes out a red TIRTIR cushion compact and begins applying it to her face. (2) She then transition to drinking a bagged meal replacement shake while holding a Wakemake eyeshadow palette, showing the colors to the camera. (3) She continues applying eye makeup including eyeshadow and eyeliner while the car is in motion, occasionally making funny facial expressions as the car bumps. (4) She uses an eyelash curler and then applies an 'Innete' brand eyelash serum; mid-way she uses a large traditional hand fan to cool herself down. (5) She finishes her look by applying a red lip tint, carefully outlining her lips, and shows the final polished look to the camera.

(2) No spoken dialogue from the person on screen is detected throughout the video. (3) Subtle ambient car movement sounds and the clicking of makeup compacts are masked by the loud background music. (4) The music maintains a consistent tempo and volume until the end of the clip.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Hook: 'POV 去採訪韓國愛豆的路上化妝' (POV: Makeup on the way to interview a Korean idol). (2) Engagement Text: '大家猜猜看我這次要採訪誰' (Guess who I'm interviewing) and '是偶像團體' (It's an idol group). (3) Challenge Context: '車上上妝挑戰!!!' (Makeup in car challenge!!!). (4) Lifestyle Context: '因為沒時間吃早餐 先喝奶昔' (Drinking shake since no time for breakfast). (5) Climate Context: '台灣夏天太悶熱 一定要好好上妝...' (Taiwan summer is hot, must do makeup well). (6) Product Hook: '我的生命innete睫毛營養液' (My life-saving Innete eyelash serum). (7) Humor: '馬上掉手機' (Dropped phone immediately) with laughing emojis. (8) Conclusion: '完成' (Finished) with a heart-eye emoji.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a split-screen layout: on the left, a person applies a translucent sheet mask; on the right, the main female character eats a gummy candy while looking surprised. (2) The scene shifts to the main character holding a white sheet mask close to her face, showing its texture. She then appears in a retail environment (Olive Young), looking at empty shelves with a disappointed expression. (3) She transitions to her home, showing the 'Sungboon Editor' product packaging. She applies the mask over serum, demonstrating the multi-step process. (4) A series of close-ups show the mask turning transparent on her face overnight. (5) The final phase shows the creator holding several variations of the product and associated serums, gesturing excitedly while showcasing her glowing skin.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, energetic electronic background music starts immediately with a fast-paced tempo. (2) A female voice speaking Mandarin begins a high-energy narration, maintaining a friendly and persuasive tone throughout. (3) Subtle sound effects like 'dings' and 'sparkles' (SFX) are layered over the music during scene transitions and product reveals. (4) The music shifts slightly in volume to accommodate the detailed explanation of product ingredients but remains constant in style. (5) The audio concludes with a clear, enthusiastic call-to-action directed at the audience.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Hook text: '韓國網上爆紅！可以吃的米紙面膜！？' (Excited tone, questioning the 'rice paper' mask trend). (2) Functional text: '用米紙敷面膜？' (Clarifying the method). (3) Brand text: 'Sungboon Editor' and 'Deep Collagen Anti-Wrinkle Lifting Mask' (Identifying the product). (4) Scientific/Effect text: '138%', '83%', '243Da' (Highlighting technical specs and efficacy). (5) Promotional text: '買三就贈三', '有史以來最低價' (Communicating the deal and urgency).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: The video follows a Hook -> Problem/Search (Sold out) -> Solution (Unboxing/Demo) -> Result -> Promotion/CTA flow.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman sits at a white desk cluttered with various Taiwanese snack bags. She introduces the theme, then picks up a clear bag of 'Da Zhu Gong' (shredded fish snack) and takes a bite with a curious expression. (2) She picks up a green Lay's box (cilantro flavor), displays a chip, and eats it while holding a Hello Kitty plushie; she appears pleasantly surprised. (3) She opens a bag of 'Guai Guai' (corn snacks), showing the contents and eating one. (4) She holds up 'Bo Po Chips' in Pineapple Cake and Century Egg flavors, reacting to each. (5) She picks up a large, round brown Hakka rice cake, taking a significant bite and then washing it down with a juice box. (6) Finally, she tries 'Ke Le Guo' (pea crackers).
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, energetic background music with a steady electronic beat begins. A female voice speaks enthusiastically in a mix of Mandarin and Korean. (2) Sound of plastic crinkling is prominent as bags are opened. Audible crunching sounds occur every time she takes a bite of a snack. (3) Music stays consistent throughout, serving as a rhythmic backdrop to her vocal reactions, which range from 'Mmm' to surprised exclamations. (4) Occasional cartoon-like sound effects (pings and pops) accentuate on-screen text appearances. No significant ambient noise is heard.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '第一次吃台灣才有的餅乾 / Trying Snacks You Can Only Find in Taiwan' establishes the video's premise. (2) Functional Text: '大豬公', '香菜', '乖乖', '鳳梨酥口味？！', '皮蛋口味' identify the specific snacks. (3) Decorative/Effect Text: '(從來沒吃過的一位)' (Someone who has never eaten it) adds context. '爽脆！！！！' (Crispy!!!!) emphasizes the texture. (4) Functional Text: '你們知道我本來不吃香菜嗎？' (Did you know I didn't eat cilantro?) provides personal trivia. (5) Decorative/Effect Text: '(感動不已)' (Extremely moved) shows emotional reaction.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Sequential testing of various snacks -> Final thoughts

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman is sitting on a sofa in a living room, drinking from a straw while watching a dating show clip on a split-screen below her; she looks curious and amused. (4) The scene shifts to her eating noodles and seaweed with great gusto, mirroring a male character eating on the show clip below; she gives a thumbs up to the camera while chewing.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with the 'Oh No' meme song (Capone - Oh No) featuring a high-pitched vocal loop. (2) This 'Oh No' audio continues and loops as the visual scenes shift through different emotional states. (3) Suddenly, the meme music cuts out and is replaced by a cheerful, commercial-style jingle with a British male voice-over saying 'Nothing beats a Jet2 holiday and right now...' before cutting off.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: 'POV 看《母單戀愛大作戰》時心情變化' (POV mood changes when watching 'Single's Inferno/Solo Battle'). (2) Decorative Text: '一開始只是覺得可愛而已' (In the beginning, I just thought it was cute) - calm tone. (3) Decorative Text: '（廷穆改路線時）' (When Tingmu changes routes) - surprised tone. (4) Decorative Text: '（聽不懂載伊在想說啥）' (Can't understand what Jae-i is trying to say) - confused tone. (5) Decorative Text: '（韓國人🇰🇷）我韓語有問題嗎...' (As a Korean, is there a problem with my Korean...) - self-deprecating tone. (6) Decorative Text: '（汝明哭的時候）' (When Yeo-myeong cries) - sad tone. (7) Decorative Text: '看相昊吃飯好有食慾了😂' (Watching Sang-ho eat makes me hungry) - joyful tone.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video is a live-action vlog. It opens with a young woman with long brown hair, wearing a blue Adidas jacket, smiling and waving at the camera in a crowded stadium. (2) Chronological montage shows the interior of the Taipei Dome, the woman cheering in the stands, and the large stadium screen displaying the girl group ITZY. (3) The woman is shown in close-up eating and drinking: first Lipton Peach Oolong Tea, then Kadina chips, followed by a protein shake, and finally BHC fried chicken and cheese balls. She displays facial expressions of deep satisfaction. (4) The visual transitions to wide shots of the baseball field and the crowd erupting in cheers as the home team scores. (5) Cuts show ITZY performing live on the field and their image on the big screen. (6) The final phase shows the woman in a bedroom setting, wearing a cat-ear headband, drinking water and looking exhausted but content.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with an upbeat, high-tempo K-pop track ('Not Shy' by ITZY) that remains the dominant audio layer throughout. (2) Faint ambient noise of a large crowd cheering and a stadium announcer's muffled voice is layered under the music. (3) No direct dialogue from the creator is audible; the soundscape is a mix of the continuous BGM and occasional stadium SFX (clapping, horns). (4) The audio transitions between stadium acoustics and a slightly quieter, studio-like clarity for the music track. (5) In the final seconds, the ambient noise fades, leaving only the music and the sound of drinking water.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) 'POV: 韓國人第一次去大巨蛋看賽' - Hook text introducing the theme. (2) '今天人生第一次去大巨蛋' - Functional text setting the scene. (3) '其實原本為了看 ITZY 去의' - Decorative text explaining motivation. (4) '（對於棒球無知）' - Humorous hook text about the creator. (5) '原來台灣這樣應援喔' - Functional observation on local culture. (6) '最期待吃東西', 'BHC 炸雞來了' - Decorative text highlighting the food focus. (7) '一直狂打安打中', '直接逆轉贏球' - Functional subtitles describing the game's climax. (8) '最後 ITZY 的表演' - Hook text introducing the performance. (9) '好像來了演唱會', '好幸福唷' - Emotional stickers reflecting the mood. (10) '看賽唯一的缺點會有後遺症' - Final hook concluding the video.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro at stadium -> Food montage -> Game climax -> ITZY performance -> Outro at home.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a close-up of Korean actor Ahn Hyo-seop looking at a large pink 'Shoutao' (longevity peach) gift with a curious expression. (2) The scene transitions to a wider shot of a press conference stage featuring actors Ahn Hyo-seop, Lee Min-ho, Nana, and Chae Soo-bin sitting in chairs. (3) A female host enters the frame, presenting the large peach gift to Ahn Hyo-seop; he takes it carefully, looking intrigued. (4) The camera cuts between the actors' reactions—Lee Min-ho smiling and repeating the word, Nana looking surprised, and Chae Soo-bin listening intently. (5) Close-up shots show Ahn Hyo-seop examining the food gift while the host explains it. (6) The video ends with the cast members laughing as the host makes a joke, with several variety-show style emojis and text overlays appearing.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) An upbeat, medium-tempo pop-style BGM starts immediately. A high-pitched, enthusiastic female voice (vocal) begins speaking in Korean. (2) Male voices join in, sounding polite and curious as they interact with the host. (3) Sound effects (SFX) like sparkles and 'ping' sounds are heard when text overlays appear. (4) The audio concludes with a mixture of collective laughter from the actors and the host, while the music maintains a cheerful tone.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: Subtitles in Traditional Chinese and English provide a translation of the Korean dialogue regarding the gift. (2) Hook Text: '讓安孝燮變好奇的台灣伴手禮？' (The Taiwanese souvenir that made Ahn Hyo-seop curious?) appears at the start. (3) Decorative/Effect Text: Variety-show captions like '壽桃' (Shoutao), '貼心暖男安孝燮' (Thoughtful warm man Ahn Hyo-seop), and '一本正經講幹話' (Talking nonsense seriously) appear with emojis to highlight humor. (4) CTA Text: '更多有趣完整採訪內容在有璟嘿呦Youtube上!' (More interesting full interviews on Youjing Heiyou Youtube!) appears at the end.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro Hook -> Cast Introduction -> Gift Presentation -> Explanation -> Reaction/Humor

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a close-up of a female creator holding a green, foam-covered object that resembles a piece of soap, looking at it with a shocked and wide-eyed expression. (2) She then presents a cardboard box containing four large, rounded, colorful rice cakes in shades of green, pink, purple, and yellow. (3) She proceeds to pick up the yellow pumpkin-flavored rice cake, unwraps it, and takes a large bite, revealing a thick filling of red bean paste and white cream cheese. (4) She continues by tasting the pink strawberry-flavored one, then the purple sweet potato, and finally the green mugwort-flavored rice cake, expressing enjoyment through smiles and nodding. (5) The video concludes with her holding a piece of the green rice cake, gesturing towards the camera as she addresses the audience.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) An upbeat, high-tempo K-pop style instrumental begins immediately. (A) A female voice speaks in a lively, high-pitched, and excited tone. (B) The background music has a driving electronic rhythm. (C) Studio quiet is maintained. (D) A soft 'pop' sound effect occurs during the first scene transition. (2) (A) The female speaker provides continuous narration, describing the flavors and textures. (B) The BGM remains steady in volume. (C) Faint, rhythmic chewing sounds are audible when she bites into the food. (D) No additional sound effects are used. (3) (A) The tone of the vocals remains friendly and inquisitive toward the end. (B) The music maintains its energy until the very end. (C) No ambient environmental noise is detected. (D) None.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Hook Text: '韓國人為了這個排隊？🌈可以吃的肥皂🧼' - Intended to grab attention with a surprising claim. (2) Decorative Text: '可以吃的肥皂？' - Reinforcing the hook. (3) Functional Text: '在韓國百貨公司買了...其實是韓國的年糕🇰🇷' - Clarifying the product's actual identity as traditional rice cakes. (4) Decorative Text: '艾草, 草莓, 地瓜, 南瓜' - Identifying the four different flavors. (5) Decorative Text: '口感真的太好了！！！' - Expressing emotional excitement about the texture. (6) Decorative Text: '大家最想吃看看哪一個口味呢？可以底下留言告訴我！！！' - Call to action for viewer engagement.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Hook (Soap?) -> Revelation (Rice Cake) -> Multi-flavor Tasting -> Final Recommendation & CTA

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman is seen indoors, meticulously styling her long brown hair with a blue curling iron. (4) She demonstrates a hair care routine in a bathroom, showing the application of shampoo, a treatment mask, hair oil, and a finishing spray from the UNOVE brand. (5) The final sequence shows her back outdoors with perfectly smooth, styled hair, posing confidently for the camera.

(2) The music continues as she narrates her frustration with humidity. (3) Rhythmic sound effects of liquid being pumped and hair being washed are audible during the tutorial segment. (4) The loud whirring sound of a hair dryer dominates the audio for a few seconds. (5) The narrator's voice becomes more cheerful in the conclusion as the music reaches its peak before fading.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) 'POV 小看台灣濕度的韓國女生的最後' - Decorative hook regarding hair and humidity. (2) '(超級認真燙直)' - Emotional text emphasizing effort. (3) '(出門30分鐘後)' - Functional text indicating time passage. (4) 'Olive Young 熱銷冠軍?' - Functional text highlighting product popularity. (5) 'UNOVE 全系列' - Functional text identifying the brand line. perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a close-up of a young woman enthusiastically eating a bowl of orange, cheesy porridge; the cheese stretches significantly as she lifts a spoonful to her mouth. (2) The scene shifts to the woman sitting at a table, holding a packet of Samyang Buldak Ramen and explaining ingredients. (3) A series of quick cuts follows, showing her preparing the dish: cutting noodles with scissors in an electric pot, adding cooked rice, pouring in spicy sauce, and adding water. (4) She then sprinkles a large amount of shredded cheese over the mixture and lets it melt. (5) She adds sesame oil and tears up pieces of Korean seaweed to sprinkle on top. (6) The final phase shows her tasting the completed dish with exaggerated expressions of delight and then holding up seaweed packets while gesturing toward the camera to promote them.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo pop music with a strong electronic beat begins. A female voice is heard making satisfying eating and slurping sounds, followed by an enthusiastic "Yummy!" (2) The music continues as the female speaker provides a fast-paced narration in Chinese, describing the steps of making the porridge. (3) Sound effects like the crisp rustling of seaweed packets, the clicking of scissors, and the bubbling of the pot are layered over the music. (4) The speaker's tone becomes more persuasive and high-pitched during the final segment as she transitions from describing the food to discussing a product sale. (5) The video ends with a final upbeat musical flourish and the speaker's closing remarks.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Hook Text: "POV 當韓國人感冒時吃的起司粥🔥" (POV: Cheese porridge Koreans eat when they have a cold) - Tone: Intriguing. (2) Functional Text: "1. 加飯一起拌一拌" (1. Add rice and mix together) - Tone: Instructional. (3) Decorative Text: "我自己超愛吃辣...再加一包火辣雞醬🔥" (I personally love spicy... adding another pack of fire chicken sauce) - Tone: Personal/Enthusiastic. (4) Functional Text: "2. 灑上一點韓國黑胡椒粉" (2. Sprinkle on some Korean black pepper powder). (5) Functional Text: "3. 加披薩起司!!!" (3. Add pizza cheese!!!) - Tone: Excited. (6) Functional Text: "4. 關火後加一點香油" (4. After turning off the heat, add a bit of sesame oil). (7) Decorative Text: "完成" (Finished) and "起司的濃郁口感真的大爆發" (The rich texture of the cheese really explodes) - Tone: Satisfied. (8) Promotional Text: "韓國海苔最低價團購 08/23 - 08/27" (Korean seaweed lowest price group buy 08/23 - 08/27) - Tone: Urgency/Call to action.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro Hook -> Step-by-Step Cooking Demo -> Eating Reaction -> Commercial Endorsement

She then holds up a large multi-pack of seaweed to the camera while continuing to eat humorously.

The primary objective is to drive immediate sales via a time-limited discount and clear instructional steps.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a young female creator in a floral dress eating a snack in a room; a split screen shows a fridge and a bowl of cereal. (5) At home, she pours the large drink into a glass bowl, adding toppings like grass jelly and taro balls, and finally adds the remaining cornflakes. (6) She eats the mixture with a large blue-and-white spoon, making exaggerated expressions of enjoyment while looking directly at the camera. (7) Close-up shots of the drink being prepared at the store and the creator holding the cup with promotional details follow.

Crunching sound effects are heard. (2) Comical 'fail' sound effects and a low groan occur as she tries the cereal with water. (3) Sound of footsteps and muffled outdoor ambient noise as she travels. (4) Liquid pouring and splashing sounds as she mixes the drink into a bowl. (5) Loud, rhythmic slurping and chewing sounds (ASMR-style) dominate as she eats the mixture. (6) Music remains upbeat through the end, concluding with an enthusiastic promotional delivery of the '2 for 99' offer.

(7) '2杯99元' (Functional: 2 cups for 99 dollars - Hook). (8) '趕快前往CoCo吧~' (Functional: Hurry to CoCo~).

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair and a pink floral top addresses the camera directly in a bright indoor setting. (4) The scene cuts to a demonstration where she removes a white capsule from a yellow blister pack and swallows it with water from a white mug. (5) Close-ups show the capsule being opened to reveal white powder and red powder being poured from a sachet into a tray. (6) A photo of a male pharmacist is displayed on screen during the explanation. (7) The creator holds up both boxes, gesturing towards text overlays showing 'Buy 3 Get 1 Free' and '40,000+ sold on Shopee'. (8) She opens a green box featuring a bear character and eats a gummy candy, making an 'OK' sign and looking pleased.

(2) A female voice speaks in an energetic, high-pitched, and persuasive tone in Mandarin Chinese. (3) Periodic 'ding' and 'pop' sound effects punctuate the appearance of text and checklist points. (4) The sound of water being swallowed is audible during the product demonstration. (5) The speaker's pace is fast, typical of promotional social media content. (6) The video ends with the music fading out as she makes a final exclamation of satisfaction while eating.

(2) 'check list' followed by '1. 平常很難上廁所', '2. 私密處會有腥味', '3. 分泌物會變多' - Functional text identifying health problems. (3) '建議試試 韓國女生的解決法' - Suggestive hook. (4) '必多提斯', 'OLIVE YOUNG 熱銷NO.1' - Brand name and sales ranking. (5) '女性專用「小黃盒」', '1天1粒用水吞即可' - Functional instructions for the yellow box product. (6) '活力腸胃、自信炫腹' - Promotional benefit claims. (7) '台灣蝦皮銷量超過4萬盒' - Social proof text. (8) '買三盒 + 贈1盒' - Call to action for a promotion.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) Two women sit side-by-side at a table. The woman on the left (wearing a green shirt) shows two dark capsules in her palm, labeled as 'Normal Person'. The woman on the right (wearing a blue shirt) shows a handful of various pills, labeled as 'Korean Nurse'. (2) The nurse begins to swallow the entire handful of pills at once, followed by drinking water from a bottle. The woman in green looks on with a shocked facial expression and wide eyes. (3) The nurse then proceeds to open and consume several different supplement packets (liquid and powder), while the woman in green continues to show exaggerated surprise and even checks the nurse's throat. (4) Finally, the nurse finishes the last of the supplements and drinks more water. The woman in green wipes the nurse's mouth with a tissue. They both look at the camera and smile, making poses.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A fast-paced, upbeat Japanese rap song with a heavy beat starts immediately and plays throughout the entire video. (2) No spoken dialogue is heard from the two women on screen. (3) The acoustic environment is dominated entirely by the studio-quality music track, with no detectable ambient noise or sound effects from the physical scene.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '一般人 VS 韓國護理師 保健品服用量差異' (Difference in supplement intake between normal person and Korean nurse), 'Korean nurse's daily supplements'. (2) Decorative/Hook Text: '(驚人)' (Shocking/Amazing) appearing when the nurse shows her pills. (3) Functional Text: '一回氣' (In one breath/at once) with a fire emoji. (4) Decorative/Hook Text: '(還確認脖子有無問題)' (Checking if the neck is okay) as the friend touches the nurse's throat. (5) Content Text: '+再來身材相關' (+More related to body shape), '+膠原蛋白' (+Collagen), '+益生菌' (+Probiotics). (6) Decorative/Hook Text: '還沒結束' (Not over yet) with a shocked emoji. (7) Hook Text: '大家平常一天吃幾顆保健品呢?' (How many supplements do you usually take a day?) at the end.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Comparison Hook -> Rapid Demonstration of Supplement Intake -> Comedic Reaction -> Ending Pose

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a close-up shot of a young woman with long brown hair wearing a grey and white top, eating spicy noodles and rice cakes from a small paper cup using wooden chopsticks. (2) Scene cuts to a large white container filled with tteokbokki (Korean spicy rice cakes) topped with a thick layer of melted cheese. (3) The woman is shown eating a spoonful of steamed egg, reacting to its heat by waving her hand and making exaggerated facial expressions of being 'burnt' by the spice and temperature. (4) Close-up shots show the cheesy tteokbokki being pulled with chopsticks, emphasizing the texture. (5) The woman continues eating while sitting in front of a laptop that is playing a Korean drama. (6) She is then seen opening a pink carton of a Korean brand drink and taking a drink to cool down her mouth.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, upbeat pop-style music with high-pitched female vocals and an electronic beat starts immediately and continues throughout. (2) Clear, amplified eating sounds (ASMR style) such as slurping noodles, chewing, and the 'clink' of chopsticks against the cup are prominent. (3) The woman makes brief vocalizations like 'Mmm' and 'Whoo' in response to the spiciness. (4) A brief segment of dialogue from a Korean drama can be heard in the background when the laptop is visible. (5) The sound of the carton being opened and the liquid being poured/swallowed is heard near the end.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) 'POV 🇰🇷韓國女生最安靜的瞬間 / The quietest moment for a Korean woman' - Hook text setting the theme of the video. (2) '在韓國吃過的人才會懂' - Hook text implying a shared cultural experience for those who have lived in Korea. (3) '這個是韓國知名辣炒年糕 동대문 엽기 떡볶이 🔥' - Functional text identifying the specific brand and food (Dongdaemun Yupdduck). (4) '一定要配蒸蛋一起吃' - Decorative/Hook text giving a food pairing recommendation. (5) '⚠️注意：很燙' - Functional text warning about the heat of the food. (6) '邊看韓劇邊吃辣炒年糕就是完美的晚上時間' - Hook text describing the 'perfect' evening routine. (7) '一定有配這飲料' - Hook text recommending the specific drink pairing.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Close-up eating shots -> Food highlights -> Contextual setting (watching drama) -> Drink pairing.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video is a live-action food review. It begins with a split-screen showing a viral Korean food trend on the left and the creator reacting on the right. (2) The creator introduces several varieties of instant Korean rice cakes (topokki) in cups and bags, holding them up to the camera with excited expressions. (3) A series of quick cuts follows, showing the creator tasting different flavors: jjajang (black bean), spicy, and cream. She uses a fork to lift the rice cakes, showing their texture close-up. (4) The creator then prepares a larger plate of 'Ddong-Ddong' topokki and performs an experiment by placing a vanilla ice cream cone upside down into the spicy sauce. (5) She mixes the melting ice cream with the sauce, tastes it with a surprised expression, and then compares it to a pre-packaged 'Rose' flavor topokki for a final verdict.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, fast-paced electronic pop music plays in the background throughout the video. (2) A female voice speaks continuously in a friendly and high-pitched tone, alternating between Mandarin and short Korean phrases. (3) Various sound effects (SFX) are used for emphasis, such as 'ding', 'pop', and digital chimes during transitions. (4) Clear audio of eating sounds (slurping and chewing) is audible during the tasting segments. (5) The music volume dips slightly when the creator is speaking and becomes more prominent during montage sequences.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: Traditional Chinese subtitles appear at the bottom, translating the creator's spoken narration and reactions. (2) Decorative/Effect Text: Large variety-show style captions appear frequently, such as '韓國流行中的超震撼組合' (Shocking combo trending in Korea), '霜淇淋辣炒年糕' (Ice cream topokki), and '實驗歐膩' (Experimental Unnie). (3) Hook Text: '韓國內行人才知道?' (Only Korean insiders know?) and '挑戰吃法' (Challenge eating method) are used to maintain viewer interest.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Multi-flavor product unboxing -> Sequential tasting -> Viral trend experiment -> Conclusion and comparison

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a young woman smiling and holding two small rabbit plushies in front of her. (2) The scene cuts to a close-up of the two rabbit plushies (one blue, one cream) sitting on a flat surface. (3) Hands enter the frame and use an alcohol wipe from a blue packet to clean the plushies. (4) A white ribbon with 'DIOR' printed on it is wrapped around the neck of the blue rabbit and tied into a bow. (5) The blue rabbit and a pink flower-shaped object are placed into a clear plastic bag decorated with gold polka dots. (6) A cartoon sticker is used to seal the bag. (7) The final shot shows two identical gift bags ready for distribution.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, fast-paced hip-hop background music begins with a strong bass beat. A female voice speaks enthusiastically in Chinese. (2) The music continues at a consistent volume as the sounds of plastic crinkling and paper rustling become audible during the cleaning and packaging process. (3) The lyrics 'I just gotta get it watch me go' are heard in the BGM. (4) The audio concludes with the music fading out alongside rhythmic plastic crinkling sounds.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '真的可以給 記得私訊給我 還有一個誰要? 可留言' (I can really give them, remember to DM me. Who wants the other one? Leave a comment). (2) Decorative Text: '(消毒一下)' (Sanitizing a bit) - neutral tone. (3) Decorative Text: '變漂亮一下' (Make it pretty) - cheerful tone. (4) Hook Text: '只給拉發霉會太過份 所以一起送韓國唇彩' (Giving only Labubu would be too much, so I'm giving Korean lip gloss together) - generous tone. (5) Functional Text: '想要的人請在底下留言喔' (Those who want it, please leave a comment below) - instructional tone.
