perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman in a black and white striped shirt stands in a kitchen, holding a package of fresh okra and introducing it to the camera. (2) She presents a packet of Buldak Mayo Tuna as a key ingredient. (3) The scene shifts to the stove where okra is boiled in a gold-colored pot, then moved to a colander and rinsed with cold water under a tap. (4) She slices the okra into small rounds on a wooden board and places them into a glass jar. (5) She adds several layers of ingredients: boiled eggs, black pepper, a golden syrup, and the Buldak Mayo Tuna mixture. (6) She closes the jar and shakes it vigorously to mix the salad. (7) Finally, she eats the spicy okra salad using a spoon and sheets of seaweed, displaying exaggerated facial expressions of delight and spice-induced heat.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo pop music begins immediately alongside a female voice speaking enthusiastically in Chinese. (2) The sounds of kitchen activity enter: the bubbling of boiling water, the clink of metal tongs, and the steady stream of a water faucet. (3) A distinct, rhythmic chopping sound is heard as the okra is sliced. (4) The music continues as the main character narrating the steps. (5) Sound effects of the jar being shaken are heard. (6) The final phase features prominent eating sounds (ASMR-style chewing and crunching) and verbal exclamations of satisfaction like 'Mmm' and 'Wow'.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '韓國人DIY 爆辣秋葵沙拉' (Korean DIY Super Spicy Okra Salad) as a main title. (2) Decorative Text: '今天一起起床' (Wake up together today) and '超級想吃一個東西 就是秋葵' (I really want to eat something, which is okra) as emotional hooks. (3) Functional Text: Sequential cooking instructions such as '放入秋葵，燙大約1分鐘' (Add okra, boil for about 1 minute) and '再切成好入口的大小' (Then cut into bite-sized pieces). (4) Decorative Text: '搖搖' (Shake shake) used during the mixing phase. (5) Emotional/Hook Text: '(好吃到極樂)' (So delicious it's like heaven) and '秋葵控快存起來' (Okra lovers, save this quickly) as a call to action.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Cooking/Preparation -> Mixing -> Mukbang/Eating Demo

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a man standing in front of an open wardrobe; a woman suddenly appears beside him holding a large pile of laundry. (2) The scene transitions to the man sitting on a beige sofa; the woman appears next to him surrounded by numerous plush toys. (3) The man is then shown at a vanity desk using an electric shaver; the woman appears and places a smaller pink beauty device near his face. (4) The final scene shows the man lying in bed under a white duvet; the woman appears and lies down next to him, resting her head near his shoulder.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A rhythmic, upbeat, and bouncy background track with a moderate tempo begins immediately. (2) A sharp 'ding' sound effect or chime plays each time the woman appears on screen, synchronized with the visual transitions. (3) No human speech or vocalizations are detected throughout the entire duration. (4) The music and sound effects maintain a consistent, studio-quality clarity with no significant ambient noise.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '✨韓國女友✨在一起的話' appearing at the top center, which refers to living with a Korean girlfriend. (2) Decorative/Hook Text: 'Life with ✨ Her ✨' displayed in a larger font below the Chinese text, setting the emotional theme of the video.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Series of domestic vignettes -> Conclusion

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young female creator with long dark hair and a black t-shirt holds up two boxes of 'Raising Labubu' eggs to the camera, smiling excitedly. (2) She switches to a white t-shirt and unboxes one package, pulling out a speckled, off-white egg similar in size to a large bird egg. (3) She places the egg into a large metal bowl filled with water, waving to the camera. (4) The scene transitions to show the egg cracking underwater after 4 hours and 24 hours, with the creator wearing a grey baseball cap and showing a disgusted facial expression. (5) She puts on plastic gloves and pulls a small, distorted rabbit-like figure out of the cracked egg, looking confused and slightly disappointed. (6) She compares the first toy with a second one, both appearing puffy and misshapen. (7) Final segment shows the toys after 3-4 days; they have expanded significantly but appear grainy and lower quality, with the creator laughing and offering to give them away.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, upbeat electronic pop music begins immediately as a female voice speaks energetically in Mandarin. (2) Sound effects including a 'splash' as the egg hits water and 'crunching/cracking' sounds as the shell breaks are audible. (3) The vocal tone shifts from excitement to skepticism and humorous disgust ('Oh my god', 'So gross') as she inspects the growing toys. (4) Brief transition music plays between time jumps. (5) The video ends with a conversational outro asking viewers if they want the toys, accompanied by the same upbeat background music.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) 'POV 🇰🇷 韓網爆紅拉布布孵化蛋 Raising Labubu' - Hook/Title at the top of the frame. (2) '拉布布養成蛋' - Functional product name identifying the toy. (3) '4小時後', '24小時後', '3到4天左右' - Functional text indicating time progression. (4) '有點噁心😂', '好怕', '歐買尬!!!', '瞳孔地震' - Decorative variety-show style text expressing shock and humor. (5) '這就是拉布布嗎？', '好慘', '誰要？' - Subtitles translating her spoken doubts and humorous offer to give the items away.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Unboxing -> Immersion Process -> Time-lapse Result -> Final Review/Disappointment.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To provide a humorous review of a trending South Korean water-growing toy ('Raising Labubu'). The video highlights the 'Instagram vs. Reality' gap, as the resulting toys look misshapen and lower quality than expected, serving as both entertainment and a consumer warning.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator's critical and laughing reaction toward the product quality suggests it is not a paid endorsement.

social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video capitalizes on the massive popularity of Labubu (POPMART) to draw in viewers interested in the IP, even though the product shown appears to be a novelty/growing toy variant.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair is holding a small chocolate cake with candles, including one in the shape of the number '9'. She has a confused and pouting facial expression. (2) She looks directly at the camera while gesturing with her hand, then she receives and holds a white 'Dior' gift box with a ribbon. (3) She smiles broadly while holding a blister pack of dark red capsules/pills in front of her face.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, upbeat electronic dance music starts immediately with a rhythmic synth lead. A female voice speaks in an energetic and inquisitive tone. (2) The music continues at a high tempo as the female voice continues to speak, punctuated by a brief silence during a transition. (3) The music maintains its energy until the end, with the female voice sounding excited and cheerful.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) 'POV 聽到台灣逢九不能慶生的時候 No 29th Birthday in Taiwan' - Hook text providing context about the superstition of not celebrating birthdays ending in 9. (2) '逢九?..' and '台灣真的會信這個?' - Decorative text reflecting the character's internal monologue and skepticism. (3) '(一起迷信)', '男友送給我...', and '(馬上破功)' - Functional and decorative text explaining that her boyfriend gave her gifts and she immediately embraced the 'superstition' for the sake of the gifts.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Hook (Questioning superstition) -> Conflict (Reaction to rule) -> Resolution (Receiving gifts).

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a young woman with long dark hair on a train, smiling and talking directly to the camera; she wears a beige patterned blouse. (2) Transitions to the woman in a restaurant, eating chicken rice with great enthusiasm, showing close-up shots of the bowl containing rice, shredded chicken, and a fried egg with a runny yolk. (3) Scene shifts to her holding hands with a male companion outdoors while walking past street food stalls and dessert shops. (4) In a Japanese-style hotel room, she is seen eating takeout chicken rice; her boyfriend surprises her by bringing a small chocolate cake with oversized candles, leading to shared laughter. (5) The woman opens a white gift box with a ribbon, revealing a red quilted wallet, and reacts with extreme excitement, covering her face and then showing the wallet to the camera. (6) The video concludes with her eating more chicken rice the following day.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) An upbeat, mid-tempo lo-fi pop background music track starts and remains consistent throughout the entire video. (2) A high-pitched, energetic female voice speaks in Mandarin, featuring frequent giggles and excited tones. (3) Ambient sounds of a restaurant (clinking of spoons, background chatter) and outdoor street noise (passing vehicles) are present during specific segments. (4) Sound effects like a 'wink' chime and a sudden high-decibel scream of joy occur during the gift reveal. (5) A male voice is heard off-camera interacting with the woman, though he is never fully seen.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: Subtitles translating the woman's speech about her birthday wish for chicken rice and her trip to Chiayi. (2) Decorative Text: 'POV' at the top, variety-show style captions like '雞肉飯' (Chicken rice), '(偷看)' (Peeking), and '(反應系女孩認證)' (Reaction-type girl certified) with laughing emojis. (3) Content & Tone: The text expresses humor and joy, emphasizing her obsession with turkey rice and the excitement of her birthday surprise.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Food journey -> Travel montage -> Hotel surprise -> Climax (gift) -> Outro

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a close-up of actress Park Shin-hye in a light pink suit, laughing and covering her mouth with her hand. A yellow exclamation mark graphic and '爆笑' text with a laughing emoji are overlaid. (2) The scene cuts to a male host in a white suit on a stage with a pink 'DR.WU' branded backdrop. He performs a brief, humorous dance move imitating K-pop choreography. (3) Transitions back to Park Shin-hye speaking into a microphone with a bright smile, then back to the host who continues his playful gestures. (4) The final sequence shows both on stage, the host gesturing towards the actress while she laughs, followed by a shot of the host holding a microphone and laughing himself.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy electronic pop music plays throughout. Loud cheering and laughter from an off-screen crowd are audible. (2) A male voice (host) speaks enthusiastically in Mandarin with a humorous and high-pitched tone, mentioning 'JENNIE' and 'Whiplash'. (3) A female voice (Park Shin-hye) is heard speaking calmly and politely in Korean, which transitions back into the host's excited shouting and the rhythmic BGM. (4) The sound of camera shutters clicking is mixed with the ambient crowd chatter.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Decorative Text: 'POV: 朴信惠笑出來的原因' (The reason Park Shin-hye burst out laughing). Tone: Hook/Humorous. (2) Effect Text: '爆笑' (Bursting with laughter) with laughing emojis. (3) Functional Text: Chinese and English subtitles translating Park Shin-hye's speech about meeting fans in Taipei and representing DR.WU. (4) Decorative Text: 'like JENNIE' and 'Whiplash' appear in large stylized fonts during the host's dance segment.

(3) The background music maintains a constant volume and tempo until the video ends; no speech or sound effects are present.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a young woman with her hair in two braids sitting in an airplane seat. She is seen applying facial mist, cream, and cushion foundation while text overlays indicate she is on a flight back to Korea. (2) She is shown eating an airplane meal, including bread and fruit, followed by a transition to her brushing her teeth in the airplane lavatory using a white toothbrush and a silver tube of toothpaste. (3) The scene shifts to an indoor studio-like setting where the woman, wearing a light green checkered top, holds the toothpaste and speaks directly to the camera, demonstrating its use and showing the product packaging. Close-up shots of her teeth and the toothpaste texture are interspersed. (4) The final segment returns to the airplane where she finishes her makeup and eventually waves to the camera while holding her passport and boarding pass.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, medium-tempo pop music with a female vocal singing a catchy melody starts immediately and remains throughout the video. Ambient white noise from an airplane cabin is subtly present in the background. (2) A female voice begins a clear and energetic narration in Mandarin, describing her journey and the specific brand of toothpaste she is using. The voice is steady, friendly, and professional. (3) Sound effects like a gentle 'ding' or 'swish' accompany some text overlays and scene transitions. The music volume remains consistent, slightly lowered to allow the narration to be dominant. (4) The narration ends as the music fades out towards the final seconds of the video.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) 'POV 緊急回韓國的飛機上化妝' (POV: Putting on makeup on the plane urgently returning to Korea) - Hook/Descriptive. (2) '刷樂 科研白旗艦版 多效管理牙膏' (Shallop Research White Flagship Multi-Effect Management Toothpaste) - Functional product title. (3) '日本原裝 微米煥白珍珠粉' (Japanese original micron whitening pearl powder) - Informative/Product feature. (4) '抽獎參與辦法...會抽出5位!' (Giveaway participation method... 5 winners will be drawn!) - Decorative/Call to action. (5) Full Mandarin subtitles translating the narration appear throughout the video.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro/Vlog -> Product Demonstration/Narration -> Outro/Conclusion

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman appears with many white dots (skincare essence) on her face, pointing to her mouth and gesturing about lip care. (2) Detailed close-ups show the texture of her lips before treatment, appearing dry and chapped. (3) She introduces two pink-packaged products: a circular lip balm pot and a tube. (4) She demonstrates the application of the 'micro-needle' lip balm using a small pink spatula, showing the gel-like texture on her hand first. (5) She then demonstrates a 'lip jelly' from a tube, showing how it is applied directly to the lips to create a glossy finish. (6) The video concludes with side-by-side comparisons of her lips before and after use, followed by her holding both products while providing promotional information.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, high-pitched female vocals in Mandarin begin immediately, speaking enthusiastically about a 'popular Korean micro-needle essence'. Upbeat, rhythmic background music starts. (2) The tone shifts slightly to a descriptive mode as she lists common lip problems like dryness and dullness. (3) The music maintains its energetic tempo as she introduces the brand 'CELLMULA' and its specific product lines. (4) The vocals become more technical, explaining ingredients like seaweed micro-needles and Centella asiatica. (5) The audio ends with a clear call to action, mentioning a discount code and prices, while the music fades out.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Hook text: '在韓國紅到不行的 臉部「微針精華」' (Extremely popular face micro-needle essence in Korea) with a Korean flag emoji. (2) Problem identification: '唇色暗沈' (Dull lip color) and '唇紋也很深' (Deep lip lines). (3) Product identification: '韓國CELLMULA推出的 泌潤微晶雙效護唇膏' (CELLMULA Microneedle Dual Effect Lip Balm). (4) Functional text: Ingredient highlights like '天然海藻微針' (Natural seaweed micro-needles). (5) Decorative text: '超級可愛呢' (Super cute) with heart-eyes emoji. (6) Promotion: '602avenue' discount code and '$999' price tag.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Problem Hook -> Close-up Analysis -> Product Introduction -> Application Demo -> Results Comparison -> CTA

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with brown hair sits in an indoor setting, opening a large cardboard box filled with numerous small, white, round rice cakes. She smiles and looks at the camera. (2) She picks up a single rice cake, showing its smooth texture and a small black sesame seed on top. She brings it to her mouth and begins eating, displaying satisfied facial expressions. (3) She tears one rice cake in half with her hands, revealing a porous, fluffy white interior. (4) She continues to eat the rice cakes, alternating between chewing and holding a yellow bottled drink. (5) She gives a thumbs up to the camera while sitting next to the open box of rice cakes.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-tempo, upbeat pop music with female vocals begins immediately. (2) Pronounced chewing and swallowing sounds (ASMR-style) are layered over the music as the woman eats. (3) A female voice speaks in Mandarin with a friendly and enthusiastic tone, explaining the food. (4) The sound of liquid being sipped through a straw is heard. (5) The music continues at a consistent volume until the video ends.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Hook: 'POV 韓國有夏天不會壞掉的年糕？' (POV: Korean rice cakes that don't spoil in summer?) - Curious tone. (2) Decorative: '比熊年糕？！' (Bichon rice cakes?!) - Excited tone. (3) Functional: '是韓國的一種米糕 기장떡(술떡)' (It's a type of Korean rice cake called gijang-tteok (sul-tteok)) - Informative tone. (4) Functional: '用米酒發酵製成的' (Made by fermenting with rice wine) - Technical tone. (5) Functional: '大家覺得這樣一盒多少錢呢？' (How much do you think a box like this costs?) - Engaging/Interactive tone. (6) Decorative: '超級搭配欸...' (Super good match...) - Satisfied tone.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman is positioned in front of a camera, holding a large clear plastic bag filled with red-marinated chicken feet. She carefully pours the contents onto a clear glass plate. (2) She picks up a piece of chicken foot with a fork and eats it, showing an exaggerated expression of surprise and then enjoyment. (3) She continues to eat various components of the dish, including green vegetables, while nodding and giving thumbs-up gestures. (4) As the spiciness takes effect, she fans her mouth with her hand and reaches for a bottle of banana milk. (5) She pours the milk into a glass, adds a dark liquid from a small sachet, and stirs it before drinking. (6) She smiles, looks satisfied, and continues eating and gesturing towards the camera until the end.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) An upbeat, fast-paced electronic background track starts immediately. (2) A female voice speaks in an energetic, high-pitched tone in Mandarin, describing the food. (3) Extremely loud, crisp, and rhythmic crunching and munching sounds (ASMR) become the primary focus as she eats. (4) The sounds of a plastic bottle being opened and liquid pouring into a glass are clearly audible. (5) The background music remains consistent throughout the video, and the speaker maintains a lively dialogue with occasional pauses for the eating sounds.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) "韓國最新流行 辣檸檬涼拌雞爪" (Korean trend: Spicy Lemon Cold Chicken Feet) - Hook text. (2) "在韓國為了吃這個 有些人甚至等1-2個月" (Some in Korea wait 1-2 months for this) - Functional informative text. (3) "有點出乎意料的味道耶！" (Unexpected taste!) - Expressive reaction. (4) "OMG！！！超級好吃" (OMG!!! Super delicious) - Emotional peak. (5) "( ASMR )" - Functional genre label. (6) "咬起來的聲音大到 自己都覺得折磨" (Chewing so loud it's torture) - Humorous commentary. (7) "辣？那就要喝香蕉牛奶" (Spicy? Then drink banana milk) - Functional solution text. (8) "我要加瘦身咖啡液" (I want to add slimming coffee liquid) - Product/Action identification. (9) "幸福指數 + 100" (Happiness index + 100) - Emotional variety-show style tag. (10) "台灣也有類似辣味涼拌雞爪嗎？" (Does Taiwan have similar chicken feet?) - Call to action question.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Food Pouring -> ASMR Eating Experience -> Spicy Reaction -> Drink Preparation -> Outro

(2) The woman eats a burger, then suddenly widens her eyes and covers her mouth with her hands. The masked figure swings the pot, hitting her on the head. (3) Close-up shots show the interior of a burger with two beef patties and a breaded squid patty. (4) The woman continues to eat various items, including fries and another burger, frequently looking at the tablet and giving thumbs-up gestures. (5) She turns around and pulls the mask off the figure behind her, revealing a young man who then begins eating the food with her. (6) The video ends with her holding up a wrapped burger toward the camera and pointing at it.

This is interrupted by a sharp, high-pitched female scream, immediately followed by a loud, resonant metallic 'clang' as a pot hits a surface. (2) Upbeat, fast-tempo electronic background music with a strong rhythmic beat begins. (3) Sounds of rustling paper bags and the crunching of fried food are layered over the music. (4) A female voice speaks rapidly in a high-pitched, enthusiastic tone, occasionally dropping to a whisper. (5) The video concludes with the same upbeat music and a final enthusiastic vocal sign-off.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman is shown in a close-up, distressed as she rubs her eye and smudges her dark eye makeup. (2) She demonstrates a 10-second recovery method using a specific makeup remover and a cotton swab to clean the smudge. (3) The scene shifts to her presenting a range of skincare products against a clean indoor background. (4) Close-up shots of her hands dispensing and applying cleansing oil and foam cleanser to her face in a bathroom setting. (5) The video concludes with her showing the product bottles and text overlays displaying promotional pricing and dates.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo pop music begins immediately. A male voice narrates in a high-pitched, energetic, and slightly comedic tone, mimicking a female persona's thoughts. (2) The narration remains continuous and fast-paced, explaining the product benefits. (3) During the cleansing demonstration, faint sound effects of water splashing and liquid dispensing are layered over the music. (4) The music maintains its energy through the final promotional segment until the video ends.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) 'POV 當女生心臟瞬間掉下去時' (Emotional hook about makeup smudging). (2) '10秒復原法' (Tutorial hook). (3) 'ILLIYOON' (Brand name). (4) '1. 把一理潤的眼唇卸妝液... 2. 用棉花棒... 3. 輕輕把糊掉的眼妝擦掉' (Step-by-step instructions). (5) '單件85折、兩件75折' (Promotion info). (6) '限時優惠只到 09/23' (Time-sensitive call to action).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Problem Hook -> Quick Fix Demo -> General Product Introduction -> Deep Cleansing Demo -> Promo Info

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a split-screen: the left side shows a man pouring multiple sauces on soup dumplings, while the right side shows a woman reacting with a shocked facial expression. (2) The woman, the main character, holds up a package of 'I-Mei Premium Pork Soup Dumplings' and shows the dumplings after being microwaved. (3) She proceeds to recreate the sauce bomb by pouring soy sauce, Suki yaki sauce, mayonnaise, and chili oil over the dumplings in a plastic tray. (4) She uses a spoon to eat the heavily sauced dumplings, showing a transition from a skeptical look to one of genuine surprise and enjoyment. (5) She adds white vinegar to the tray, finishes the meal with a thumbs up, and gestures 'sorry' to the camera with her hands together.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, medium-tempo pop music with a funk bassline starts and continues throughout. A woman's voice is heard speaking in Mandarin with an excited and high-pitched tone. (2) Faint audio from the original video clip (a male voice saying 'Oh my god') is heard briefly in the first few seconds. (3) The music stays consistent as the woman narrating the process. Slurping and chewing sounds are clearly audible during the tasting phase. (4) The music and vocals conclude together as the video ends.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Hook text at the top: '美國人都會這樣吃？醬油炸彈小籠包!!' (Do Americans eat like this? Soy sauce bomb soup dumplings!!). (2) Incremental counters '+1', '+2', '+3' appear as sauces are added. (3) Captions describing the process: '實驗歐膩' (Experiment Oni), '倒到滿' (Pour until full), and '改造中...' (Under renovation/reconstruction). (4) Emotional reaction text: '看起來好死鹹!!!' (Looks so salty!!!) and '真的好吃!!!' (Really delicious!!!). (5) Closing text: '包意思' (A play on words for 'Sorry' or 'My bad').

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Hook (Viral reaction) -> Preparation (Cooking) -> Tasting -> Final Verdict

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a black t-shirt and grey trousers, is bending over to reach into a white refrigerator in a kitchen. As she grabs a green fruit, a hand enters the frame from the left and pinches the soft skin on her upper arm. She turns her head towards the camera with a surprised and slightly annoyed expression. (2) The scene cuts to a marmot standing on its hind legs in a grassy field; a hand pinches the fat on its side, and the marmot looks directly at the camera with a startled, wide-eyed expression. (3) The footage cuts rapidly back and forth between the woman being pinched and the marmot being pinched, drawing a visual parallel between their reactions and the way their skin folds.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy, orchestral theatrical music starts immediately with a strong rhythmic pulse and melodic strings. No vocals are detected. (2) The music continues at a consistent volume and tempo, dominating the audio track. (3) The music maintains its dramatic and slightly comedic tone throughout the scene transitions until the video ends.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Decorative/Hook Text: "POV 女生最愛到瘋掉的男友舉動" (POV: The boyfriend behavior that girls love/hate to death). The tone is humorous, hyperbolic, and meant to engage viewers through a relatable relationship trope.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a black-and-white checkered dress, stands in a brightly lit indoor room. (2) She suddenly pulls a large yellow pomelo (yuzu) from behind her back/dress area, revealing that the 'bump' was just the fruit. She laughs and begins talking animatedly to the camera, using frequent hand gestures. (3) A series of screenshots and variety-show style text bubbles appear as she explains her situation. She holds the pomelo throughout the explanation, eventually smiling and waving at the end.

(2) The music remains constant in the background while the vocal continues the explanation. Several sharp sound effects (SFX) like 'ding' and 'whoosh' are heard synchronized with text appearing on screen. (3) The speaking ends as the music reaches its final loop and cuts off.

(2) '我被發現了' (Decorative/Hook Text: 'I've been found out' - humorous tone). (3) '我還沒懷孕！' (Decorative Text: 'I'm not pregnant yet!' - emphatic tone). (4) '公開男朋友' (Functional Text: 'Publicly announcing boyfriend' appearing over a screenshot of a couple).

perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: A static list of nine English phrases and their Korean romanized/script equivalents is displayed at the top center throughout the video. (2) Decorative/Hook Text: Dynamic captions appear at the bottom center, synchronized with the audio, showing Chinese translations and Korean phonetics like '不好意思 - Jeogiyo' (polite/informative tone) and '有可能 - Amadoyo' (informative tone). (3) Functional Text: This pattern continues for phrases like '是 - Ne', '不是 - Aniyo', '不知道 - Mollayo', '我知道 - Aryayo', '對不起 - Juesonghamnida', '謝謝 - Gamsahamnida', and '沒關係 - Gwaenchanayo'.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman holds a smartphone displaying TinyTAN characters and a McDonald's promotion, looking extremely excited and vocal. (2) A fast-paced montage shows her repeatedly pestering her boyfriend (who is sitting on a sofa or walking) about the TinyTAN blind boxes in various locations. (3) She arrives at a McDonald's storefront, looks inside, then turns to the camera with a devastated expression. (4) She is seen crying outside on the street near a McDonald's sign, holding her head. (5) Back indoors on a sofa, she is eating a McFlurry while scrolling through her phone, appearing to explain the specific rules and dates of the promotion to the camera.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, fast-paced background music begins with the woman speaking in a high-pitched, excited tone. (2) Repetitive vocal clips of the woman saying "TinyTAN..." are layered over short scene cuts, accompanied by cartoonish "ding" and "whoosh" sound effects. (3) The music becomes slightly more dramatic/melancholic as she fake-cries outside the store. (4) The music settles into a steady, rhythmic pop beat as she speaks clearly and informatively while eating.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) POV 女友有想要的東西的時候 (POV When your girlfriend wants something) - Decorative/Hook. (2) 上禮拜看到麥當勞的新聞 (Saw McDonald's news last week) - Functional. (3) TinyTAN 盲盒 (TinyTAN Blind Box) - Functional. (4) (ARMY本人) (Actually an ARMY) - Decorative. (5) 希望可以抽到啊 (Hope I can get it) - Functional. (6) 成功? (Success?) - Hook. (7) 3分鐘後... (3 minutes later...) - Functional. (8) 日期記錯!!! (Got the date wrong!!!) - Decorative/Emotional. (9) 10月8號 上午10點30分起 (Starting Oct 8th, 10:30 AM) - Functional.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Anticipation -> Obsessive Request -> Failure at the Scene -> Post-failure Explanation and Detail Sharing.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman is seated at a table with an empty glass jar. She begins scooping cookies and cream ice cream from a 'Poki' tub into the jar. She accidentally drops a scoop and reacts with a playful, embarrassed expression. (2) She adds several ice cubes into the jar. Then, she pours almond milk from a carton into a separate plastic shaker bottle, spilling a significant amount on the table, to which she reacts with a wide-eyed, comical stare at the camera. (3) She presents a brown box of 'SERYCUT PRESSO V2' and its individual coffee sachets to the camera. She pours a liquid coffee sachet into the shaker with milk and shakes it vigorously. (4) She pours the coffee-milk mixture over the ice and ice cream in the jar. She stirs the concoction with a long spoon/straw and takes a long sip, showing a look of intense delight and satisfaction. (5) She holds up multiple boxes of the product and a sachet, gesturing towards them while talking. She then caps the jar and places it into a brown leather handbag, ending with her continuing to sip the drink.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, rhythmic piano music plays consistently. A female voice speaks in a high-pitched, enthusiastic, and friendly tone. Tapping and scooping sounds are heard as she handles the ice cream tub. (2) The music continues as the speaker's tone becomes more playful during the spill. Liquid splashing and ice clinking sounds are prominent. (3) The speaker's voice maintains a persuasive and informative tone while describing the product. The sound of tearing paper and liquid shaking is audible. (4) Vocal expressions of enjoyment ('Mmm') are heard after tasting. The background music maintains its steady tempo. (5) The speaker concludes with a call-to-action tone, with the piano music fading slightly towards the end.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: 'POV 台灣人看了會療癒死了的影片' (POV A video that Taiwanese people will find healing). Tone: Hook. (2) Decorative Text: '無罪惡 冰淇淋咖啡拿鐵' (Guilt-free ice cream coffee latte). Tone: Informative/Appetizing. (3) Decorative Text: '(逃跑)' (Run away) and '若無其事地把冰淇淋放回去' (Casually putting the ice cream back). Tone: Humorous. (4) Functional Text: '習慣了' (Used to it) after a spill. Tone: Relatable. (5) Functional Text: '我的秘密武器' (My secret weapon) introducing 'SERYCUT' coffee. Tone: Endorsement. (6) Decorative Text: '瘋掉了!!' (Crazy!!) and '超級無敵好吃' (Super delicious). Tone: Excited. (7) Functional Text: '38折起!!!' (Starting from 38% off!!!) and '數量有限!' (Limited quantity!). Tone: Promotional/Urgent.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a split-screen layout; the left side displays a reference video of another female influencer eating, while the right side features the main female creator reacting. (2) The scene transitions to the main creator sitting at a low wooden table, holding a transparent retail tray of long, white, raw cow spinal cords. She shows a close-up of the product label. (3) She uses metal tongs to lift a single, long, rubbery strip of the cord, demonstrating its flexibility and texture to the camera with a curious expression. (4) She pours a yellow dipping sauce (likely sesame oil and salt) into a small bowl. (5) She picks up a long piece of the raw cord with her tongs and eats it, showing a satisfied facial expression. (6) The video then shows her with a plate containing both raw and pan-fried versions of the cord. She compares the two by tasting the cooked version and using her phone to record the sound of her chewing.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, upbeat electronic background music begins. An energetic female voice starts narrating in a high-pitched, enthusiastic tone. (2) As the narrator begins to eat, the background music volume decreases, and the sounds of crunching, chewing, and slurping are amplified (ASMR style). (3) A deep-pitched male voice (identified as her father) is heard speaking in the background, having a brief conversation with the narrator. (4) The narrator continues to speak enthusiastically between bites, with sound effects like 'munch' and 'sizzle' occasionally highlighted.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional text at the top: '韓國網紅吃的白條東西? 生吃牛脊髓' (Korean influencer's white strip food? Eating raw cow spinal cord). (2) Functional subtitles in Traditional Chinese throughout the video translating the narrator's speech. (3) Decorative/Hook text: '(爸爸在看)' (Dad is watching) to add humor, '??' question marks for reaction, and '比想像中還沒什麼內臟味' (Less offal taste than imagined) to describe the flavor.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a split-screen reaction to a Western female creator eating ribbon-shaped candy; the host on the right shows a surprised facial expression. (2) The scene shifts to the host in a bedroom setting, holding a small white dog and searching on a laptop. (3) The host presents two boxes of candy (red and green) to the camera with an excited expression. (4) Close-up shot of the green candy package being opened to reveal broken pieces, followed by the host's shocked facial expression with hands over her mouth. (5) The host attempts to eat the green candy, struggling to bite into its hard surface. (6) She switches to the red candy, demonstrating its elasticity and hardness, and eventually bites into a piece. (7) Final segment shows her holding the remaining candy pieces and talking directly to the camera with varying hand gestures.

Two female voices are heard simultaneously: one in English (from the reaction video) and the host's high-pitched Korean narration. (2) A dog barks briefly in the background. (3) Sound of plastic packaging crinkling and a distinct 'snap' sound when the candy is revealed to be broken. (4) The music continues as the host's voice becomes more animated and high-pitched. (5) Clear 'crunch' and 'clack' sounds are heard as the host bites into the hard candy. (6) A cartoon-like 'whoosh' sound effect occurs during a scene transition. (7) The music remains consistent in volume as the host's talking density increases towards the end.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '海外網紅都在吃這個？蝴蝶結糖果' (Foreign influencers are all eating this? Ribbon candy). (2) Decorative Text: '蝴蝶結樣子的塑膠？' (Plastic shaped like a ribbon?) and '原來是糖果？！' (Turns out it's candy?!). (3) Functional Text: '發現韓國也只能網購而且要等很久...' (Found out Korea can only buy it online and wait for a long time...). (4) Decorative Text: '慌張' (Panic) and '真是無言' (Speechless) appearing as captions for emotional emphasis. (4) The woman is seen picking out bread with a tray and tongs while talking enthusiastically. (5) The setting changes to an indoor living room where the woman is sitting on a sofa. (6) She tears into a salt croissant and eats it, followed by a large piece of mentaiko French bread, reacting with wide-eyed excitement and nodding. (7) She eats an egg tart and finishes the video by gesturing to the camera with a satisfied smile.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, upbeat electronic background music with rhythmic vocal samples starts immediately. A female voice speaks in an energetic and high-pitched tone in Korean. (2) Music continues with a steady drum beat. Very faint ambient chatter from the bakery is audible in the background. (3) Sharp sound effects like "dings" and "clicks" accompany rapid visual transitions. (4) Explicit foley sounds of bread crunching and being torn are heard clearly during the tasting segment. (5) A brief, lower-pitched male voice is heard responding to the woman in the final seconds before the music fades out.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) "韓國人就傻眼了" (Korean person is dumbfounded) - Hook text. (2) "每天都在排隊的台北麵包店?" (A Taipei bakery with a queue every day?) - Hook text. (3) "一次限20個人進去" (Limit 20 people at a time) - Functional text providing shop rules. (4) "聽說這家的蛋塔跟鹽可頌是必吃" (Heard their egg tarts and salt croissants are must-eats) - Recommendation. (5) "重頭戲來了，這家的明太子法國麵包" (The main event is here: the mentaiko French bread) - Highlight text. (6) "我真的要瘋了...這也太好吃了吧" (I'm going crazy... this is too delicious) - Emotional variety-show style captions. (7) "回訪願意100%" (100% willing to revisit) - Concluding endorsement.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a female character in a retail store setting representing South Korea, she is dressed in black and holding a credit card while interacting with an unseen cashier. (3) A series of quick cuts follows, showing her reacting to delivery times in Korea (overnight) versus Taiwan (longer wait times) while holding shipping boxes. (4) The narrative shifts as she discusses a mobile app interface on her smartphone, looking puzzled then excited. (5) Screen recordings of the Shopee app are shown, detailing a commission program with various product listings like DHC vitamins. (6) The video concludes with the female character back in the pink shirt, making heart gestures and pointing to the screen with a referral code overlay.

(2) A female voice starts by speaking Korean in an polite service-oriented tone, followed by a switch to Mandarin Chinese for the rest of the video. (3) Sound effects include a cash register 'ding', a 'pop' sound for text appearances, and a 'huh?' sound effect to emphasize confusion. (4) In the middle section, a male voiceover enters, speaking Mandarin in a clear, instructional, and enthusiastic manner to explain the app features. (4) '15%以上的分潤' (Over 15% commission) - Promotional hook in bold yellow/red text. (5) '快使用我的推薦碼 6W5YV5E' (Quickly use my referral code 6W5YV5E) - Call to action text at the end.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young Asian woman with long dark hair holds a package of Dr. Wonder Piercing Ear Seeds in front of a neutral-toned wall, pointing at the diagram on the back. (2) Close-up shots show the individual seeds on her hand and the woman applying them to her ear using tweezers after cleaning it with a cotton pad. (3) The scene shifts to her wearing different outfits over three days: eating in a restaurant, sitting in a car, and lying on a sofa at home. (4) Close-ups of her ear reveal the small seeds attached at various points. She touches her ear and makes a pained facial expression. (5) In the final phase, she looks directly at the camera with a skeptical or neutral expression, gesturing towards her ear as she speaks.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) An upbeat, mid-tempo pop track with synthesized elements and a steady drum beat begins. A female voice speaks in an energetic, clear, and high-pitched tone in Chinese. (2) As the video progresses, the music continues at a consistent volume while the speaker explains the application process. Occasional 'ding' and 'pop' sound effects are used for transition emphasis. (3) Ambient sounds include the faint clinking of dishes in a restaurant and the low hum of a car engine during specific cuts. (4) The speaker's tone becomes more observational and slightly questioning in the later stages of the video. (5) The music fades out as the video ends with the speaker's final remarks.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Decorative text: '在韓國買到' (Bought in Korea), '可以消水腫的' (Can reduce edema), '穴位耳針' (Acupoint ear pins). (2) Hook text: '有這種設計!' (There's this design!) expressing surprise. (3) Functional text: '1. 先用酒精棉片把耳朵擦一擦' (1. Wipe ears with alcohol pad) and '2. 把耳針貼上去' (2. Put the ear pins on) providing instructions. (4) Effect text: '喔?' (Oh?), '黑色看起來有點像痣' (Black ones look like moles) reflecting personal observation. (5) Hook text: '你過關!' (You passed!), '到晚上耳朵尾端超痛' (Ear tip hurts so much by night) conveying physical sensation. (6) Decorative text: '隔天早上' (Next morning), '第三天!' (Third day!) indicating the passage of time. (7) Hook text: '我覺得有點像把錢丟水裡' (I feel like throwing money into the water) expressing a negative final review.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a close-up shot of a hand dipping a piece of fried dough stick (Youtiao) into a small bowl of hot pot broth. (2) The scene cuts to a young woman wearing a baseball cap (labeled as Taiwanese friend) who looks at the food with an expression of disgust and skepticism. (3) The scene cuts to another young woman (labeled as Korean person) who eagerly takes a large bite of the dipped fried dough stick, smiling and nodding with satisfaction while chewing. (4) The camera remains on the Korean woman as she continues to enjoy the food, showing a clear contrast to the previous reaction.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) An upbeat, fast-paced K-pop or electronic track with high-pitched female vocal samples starts immediately. The music is rhythmic and energetic. (2) The same music continues at a consistent volume throughout the video, providing a rhythmic backdrop to the visual cuts. (3) No direct dialogue or ambient restaurant noise is audible; the music track is the sole audio component.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) "油條沾火鍋湯頭吃是否邪教!?" (Is dipping fried dough in hot pot broth heresy!?) - This is a central hook text in black and white boxes. (2) "Yes 💢 / No 😌" - A functional hook prompting a choice. (3) "（台灣朋友）" (Taiwanese friend) - Descriptive text identifying the first person. (4) "🇰🇷 韓國人" (Korean person) - Descriptive text identifying the second person.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a young woman in a pink top sitting in front of two boxes of Korean fried chicken, one original and one glazed. Above her are icons of corn, noodles, yogurt, and a chicken leg. (2) She demonstrates various eating methods: first, she pulls a stretchy corn cheese mixture onto the chicken and eats it with an exaggerated expression of enjoyment. (3) Second, she eats spicy noodles alongside the chicken. (4) Third, she dips the chicken into a bowl of yogurt sauce. (5) Fourth, she wraps a piece of fried chicken in a large green lettuce leaf and takes a large bite. (6) Interspersed between these eating segments, she holds up a silver Taishin Bank credit card, pointing at it while various promotional screens showing discount percentages and partner brands (like CU, GS25, Olive Young) are overlaid on the screen. (7) The video concludes with her giving a thumbs-up and continuing to enjoy the food.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Enthusiastic female vocals in Mandarin Chinese start immediately, accompanied by upbeat, high-tempo pop background music. (2) Loud, clear ASMR-style crunching and chewing sounds are prominently featured whenever the woman takes a bite. (3) Occasional 'ding' and sparkle sound effects occur simultaneously with the appearance of text overlays and brand logos. (4) The music maintains a consistent, energetic rhythm throughout the entire video, with the vocal delivery being fast-paced and persuasive during the credit card promotion segments.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '韓國人教你 韓式炸雞道地吃法' (Koreans teach you authentic ways to eat Korean fried chicken) appearing as a main title. (2) Decorative/Hook Text: '1.玉米起司 Corn Cheese', '2.火辣雞麵 Buldak noodles', '3.蜂蜜優格醬 Yogurt sauce', '5.包生菜吃' (Wrap in lettuce) used to categorize segments. (3) Functional/Promotion Text: '台新銀行太陽卡/玫瑰卡' (Taishin Bank Sun Card/Rose Card), '最高10%回饋' (Up to 10% cashback), and '24吋質感行李箱' (24-inch textured suitcase) highlighting card benefits and sign-up rewards.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Multi-method eating demonstration with integrated credit card promotion segments -> Final recommendation.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a female presenter holding two small bowls of sliced okra. (2) She transitions to a kitchen setting where she adds white rice into a large glass bowl, followed by cracking two onsen eggs. (3) She then pours a significant amount of sliced okra into the bowl, creating a sticky, slimy visual texture. (4) She adds soy sauce, vinegar, and sesame oil from various bottles. (5) She uses a blue and white patterned spoon to thoroughly mix the ingredients, highlighting the gooey consistency. (6) The video shifts to her eating large spoonfuls of the mixture with exaggerated facial expressions of enjoyment. (7) She takes a pack of Korean seaweed and uses individual sheets to wrap the rice mixture before eating. (8) She takes a sip from a large glass of iced tea and continues eating the remaining okra rice.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) An upbeat, high-tempo electronic background track begins immediately. A young female voice speaks in an energetic and high-pitched tone, introducing the dish. (2) Sounds of eggshells cracking and the clinking of a metal spoon against glass are audible during the preparation. (3) The background music remains constant as the narrator explains her love for okra and her fear of not finding it in Korea. (4) During the eating phase, rhythmic chewing and occasional slurping sounds (ASMR-style) are emphasized, interspersed with the narrator's enthusiastic exclamations of 'Mmm!' and 'Delicious!'.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '秋葵加爆拌飯 Okra Rice bowl' (Hook/Title). (2) Decorative Text: '99%韓國人不知道秋葵是什麼' (Variety-style hook about Koreans and okra). (3) Functional Text: '加溫泉蛋 (半熟蛋, 生蛋黃都可以)' (Instructions for adding eggs). (4) Decorative Text: '口感很新鮮又濃稠' (Emotional description of the texture). (5) Decorative Text: '秋葵加爆拌飯完成' (Completion notice). (6) Decorative Text: '=沒有臭味的納豆' (Comparison to natto).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Ingredient Preparation -> Mixing -> Mukbang/Tasting -> Conclusion

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a close-up of a young woman applying a white, heart-shaped collagen patch to her cheek, displaying a surprised facial expression. (2) She transitions to showing several purple-packaged skincare boxes. (3) A sequence follows demonstrating a multi-step application: spraying a purple mist, applying white patches to the cheeks and forehead, showing them dissolve into the skin, and finally peeling off a mesh backing. (4) Multiple close-ups highlight the resulting glow on her skin. (5) She is then seen applying various creams and serums to her hand and face. (6) A transition occurs to a talking-head shot where she holds the products and points to promotional text and product flyers that overlay the screen. (7) Before-and-after comparison photos of her face are shown briefly.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio starts with an energetic, high-pitched female voice speaking Mandarin Chinese over an upbeat, fast-tempo electronic background track. (2) As the product demonstration begins, the vocal tone remains enthusiastic and persuasive, punctuated by 'ting' and 'sparkle' sound effects when results are shown. (3) The background music remains consistent in volume as the speaker transitions into a more informational tone regarding pricing and availability towards the end.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Hook text: "韓國&美國 紅到不行？" (Korea & USA so popular?), "一貼就融化的膠原蛋白貼片？" (A collagen patch that melts when applied?). (2) Step-by-step numbers: "1. 先噴專用的膠原噴霧..." (1. First spray special collagen mist...), "2. 打開包裝..." (2. Open packaging...), "3. 貼上去" (3. Apply it), "4. 膠原蛋白會慢慢融化" (4. Collagen will slowly melt). (3) Result description: "燈泡肌~!" (Light bulb skin!). (4) Promotional details: "12/11~12/15 只開五天" (Dec 11-15, only open 5 days), "3D貼片套組 目前只有90組" (3D patch set, only 90 sets currently), prices like "$3,119元". (5) CTA: "購買連結在我的IG主頁" (Purchase link in my IG bio).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Hook -> Product Demo -> Result Evidence -> Promotion/Offer -> CTA

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman in a black t-shirt is in a kitchen setting, holding a black package of Buldak ramen and speaking excitedly to the camera. (3) A close-up shows the cheese melting into a 'waterfall' effect as the noodles are lifted with chopsticks. (4) The woman is then seen sitting on a sofa in a living room, eating the prepared noodles and dipping pieces of fried chicken into a white yogurt sauce. She continues to eat and talk while looking at the camera. (5) The final segment shows her eating a slice of layered chocolate cake.

A high-pitched, energetic female voice speaks in Mandarin Chinese. (2) Sizzling and bubbling sounds are heard clearly as the food is cooked. (3) The audio transitions to include loud slurping and chewing sounds (mukbang style) as the woman eats, with the music maintaining a steady rhythm in the background. (4) The female voice provides a continuous narration of her eating experience and her thoughts on the food.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long brown hair, wearing a voluminous grey faux-fur coat, stands in a brightly lit convenience store looking surprised at the camera. (2) The camera switches to a series of point-of-view shots where a hand reaches out to select various snacks from refrigerated shelves: a cream-filled mochi pastry, a sliced sponge cake, a pudding cup, a can of Sapporo beer, a natto roll, and a chocolate box. (3) The setting shifts to a hotel room with warm, dim lighting. The woman, now in a grey hoodie, sits on a bed and unboxes the mochi pastry. (4) She takes large bites of the pastry, looking into the camera with wide eyes and humorous, exaggerated expressions of delight. (5) She proceeds to show and eat a chocolate biscuit and then the natto roll, demonstrating the sticky 'stringy' texture of the natto to the lens while nodding in approval.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo electronic pop music with a bright melody plays continuously. A female voice speaks enthusiastically in Korean. (2) Subtle 'pop' and 'ting' sound effects occur rhythmically, coinciding with transitions and text appearances. (3) The music continues as the primary layer, but sounds of crinkling plastic packaging and clear chewing/swallowing sounds (ASMR-style) are layered over it. (4) The female voice maintains an excited, descriptive tone throughout the tasting segments, ending with a satisfied exclamation.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Hook text: '只有韓國人在日本便利商店會買這些？' (Do only Koreans buy these in Japanese convenience stores?) with a surprised emoji. (2) Numbered list of items: '1. 麻糬奶乳捲', '2. 北海道生乳蛋糕', '3. 布丁', '4. 北海道限定啤酒', '5. 納豆飯捲'. (3) Descriptive/Hook text: '只剩一個好奇購買' (Bought it out of curiosity because only one was left), '奶油真的瘋掉' (The cream is insane), '超級超級好吃' (Super super delicious), '好吃到不行' (So good it's unacceptable).

Finally, she holds up a bottle of BIOHEAL BOH serum and makes a peace sign to the camera.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair sits behind a table featuring two plates: one with several large pieces of raw white onion and another with a carton of dumplings. She starts by gesturing with her hands and speaking directly to the camera with an expressive face. (2) She picks up a bottle of sauce and pours it over the dumplings. Using chopsticks, she takes a piece of onion, places a dumpling on top of it, and eats the combined bite, reacting with wide eyes and a surprised expression to the flavor/spiciness. (3) For the second phase, she adds a darker red sauce to the dumplings and repeats the process of eating a large mouthful. (4) For the third bite, she sandwiches a dumpling between two layers of onion, creating a 'sandwich' effect, and consumes it in one massive bite. (5) After swallowing, she appears to be struggling with the spiciness or size of the bite, clutching her throat. She then pulls out a red can of Coca-Cola, opens it with a distinct pop, and drinks it to soothe her mouth.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A lighthearted, mid-tempo jazzy track featuring piano and soft percussion starts immediately. A female voice speaks in a high-pitched, enthusiastic tone, narrating a plan. (2) Rhythmic chewing sounds and a soft swallow are audible as she eats. (3) The female voice continues with a slightly humorous, self-justifying tone. (4) A sharp metallic 'clink' and 'pop' of a soda can opening is heard, followed by the sound of pouring or fizzing. (5) The music continues as she takes a long drink, ending with a satisfied but slightly defeated verbal conclusion.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '你們知道' (Do you know) - Hook text, curious. (2) '三口減肥法' (Three-bite diet method) - Topic title. (3) '你想吃的東西都可以吃' (You can eat anything you want) - Functional instruction. (4) '但只能吃三口' (But only three bites) - Rule setting. (5) '(小籠包)' (Xiao Long Bao) - Identifying the food. (6) '第一口' (First bite) - Step marker. (7) '先準備洋蔥！' (Prepare onions first!) - Instructional. (8) '果然配著洋蔥一起吃 整個口味變得超清爽耶' (Indeed eating with onions makes the flavor super refreshing) - Subjective review. (9) '有點辣' (A bit spicy) - Reaction. (10) '說一套，做一套' (Saying one thing, doing another) - Humorous commentary on her behavior. (11) '加了火雞辣醬' (Added Buldak sauce) - Detail. (12) '第二口' (Second bite) - Step marker. (13) '減肥太簡單了吧' (Losing weight is too easy) - Sarcastic hook. (14) '好好吃喔' (So delicious) - Emotional reaction. (15) '第三口' (Third bite) - Step marker. (16) '看起來有點像雪人' (Looks a bit like a snowman) - Decorative observation. (17) '反正能一口吃掉 不就好了嗎？' (Anyway, if I can eat it in one bite, isn't it fine?) - Humorous logic. (18) '突然喉嚨被噎到' (Suddenly got stuck in the throat) - Situational description. (19) '真的沒辦法' (Really no other way) - Resigned tone. (20) '只好喝了可樂' (Had to drink coke) - Action description. (21) '三口減肥法好簡單喔' (The three-bite diet is so easy) - Sarcastic summary.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Concept Intro -> Three Huge 'Bites' Demonstration -> Choking/Spiciness Climax -> Breaking the Diet with Soda

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a beige turtleneck sweater, sits at a table and talks to the camera, holding a large covered food container. perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with dark hair stands on a city street at night, appearing lost before entering a building through a hidden door that looks like a vending machine. (2) The scene shifts to the interior of a dimly lit, stylish bar where a male bartender mixes cocktails; the woman is shown tasting various drinks and colorful snacks, specifically Doritos paired with gourmet dips. (3) A series of quick cuts follows as she visits four different bars, each with unique decor from modern minimalist to cozy wooden aesthetics, always featuring Doritos branding and food pairings. (4) Close-up shots highlight the food: chips topped with cheese, skewers crusted with chip crumbs, and vibrant salsa bowls. (5) The video concludes with the woman back outdoors, speaking to the camera while holding a red promotional flyer for 'Bar Quest'.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with upbeat, fast-paced electronic pop music that maintains a consistent energy throughout. A young woman's voice-over begins immediately, speaking in an enthusiastic and friendly tone. (2) As the visuals move into bars, the sound of a cocktail shaker rhythmically clanking and liquid splashing into a glass is clearly audible over the music. (3) Occasional low-level ambient chatter and the clinking of glassware provide a 'nightlife' atmosphere. (4) Periodic sound effects (SFX) like sparkles or chimes accompany on-screen text appearances. perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman sits behind a pink table set with a large plate of salmon sashimi and a bowl of spicy noodles. She is initially wearing a thick, white fiber face mask that covers her mouth, attempting to eat the salmon with chopsticks. (2) She realizes the difficulty and removes the white mask, showing a smartphone screen featuring Hailey Bieber as inspiration for the challenge. She then applies a transparent, gel-like mask and uses scissors to carefully cut a horizontal slit across the mouth area. (3) She successfully eats the salmon and the spicy noodles through the slit, showing exaggerated expressions of heat from the spices and satisfaction with the food. (4) The scene shifts to her holding up various green and blue boxes of 'SEXYLOOK' face masks. She demonstrates the mask's thinness by showing it up close on her face and squeezing essence from the packaging onto her hand. She points to her glowing skin in 'Before' and 'After' comparison shots.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy, upbeat electronic pop BGM begins immediately. A young female voice speaks rapidly in Mandarin with an excited and engaging tone. (2) Sound effects like a 'snip' for the scissors and variety-show style 'ding' sounds occur during transitions. (3) Audible slurping sounds as she eats the noodles, followed by sharp intakes of breath and 'hissing' sounds to indicate the spiciness of the food. (4) The BGM remains consistent but slightly lower in volume as the vocals shift to a more descriptive, informative tone while explaining the product features, ending with a cheerful sign-off.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Hook Text: '敷面膜吃東西挑戰 Eating with a face mask challenge' (Excited/Curious tone). (2) Decorative Text: '最近超多美國人挑戰這個!!!' (Viral hook), '(聽起來簡單?)' (Skeptical/Playful), '(女生才會懂吧~)' (Relatable). (3) Functional Text: '不行欸!', '精華份量超多' (Highlighting product quality), '終於可以了?!', '好好吃喔'. (4) Brand Text: 'SEXYLOOK', '海茴香外泌體水光面膜', '積雪草外泌體保濕面膜', 'AI智能管家' (Professional/Promotional tone).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Hook (Challenge) -> Problem Solving -> Successful Demo -> Detailed Product Review/Endorsement

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a close-up of a female character using a tissue to wipe off foundation from her cheek, revealing significant redness and blemishes underneath. (2) Several extreme close-ups follow, showing the raw texture of her skin, including redness around the nose and mouth area. (3) She holds a red, egg-shaped cushion compact and begins patting it onto her face, showing a stark contrast where the product instantly hides the redness. (4) The final sequence shows her with a fully made-up, glowing complexion, followed by her using a setting spray and holding the product while giving a thumbs-up.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) An upbeat, fast-paced Japanese pop song starts immediately with a male vocalist singing with high energy. (2) The music maintains a consistent, high-BPM tempo throughout the entire video with a driving drum beat and electronic keyboard melodies. (3) There are no spoken vocals from the person on screen, nor any identifiable ambient noises or sound effects; the music dominates the entire audio track.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '誰說韓妞皮膚都很好?...' (Who says Korean girls all have good skin? - Hook) (2) '這遮瑕力太讚了吧...' (This coverage is too good... - Emotional) (3) '只用一個氣墊.... 真的可以蓋皮膚小狀況!' (Using only one cushion... can really cover skin conditions! - Informative) (4) '🇰🇷72小時紅色氣墊 06/11要公開團購連結!' (72-hour red cushion, group buy link on 06/11 - Functional).

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with two women in a room looking at the camera, while a top-screen insert shows young girls performing a hip-shaking dance move. (2) The scene cuts to a gym environment where the two women attempt the same dance move while walking forward; they look at each other with expressions of confusion and amusement. (3) The scene shifts to an outdoor sidewalk where they continue the awkward walking dance; an insert photo shows older women walking in a similar fashion. (4) They start laughing and eventually give up the dance. (5) A final close-up of the woman with black hair walking is shown with a music video clip of PSY's 'Daddy' overlaid at the bottom.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo electronic dance music starts with heavy synth beats; two female voices are heard talking excitedly and laughing. (2) The repetitive electronic rhythm continues as the main audio track through the dance attempts. (3) At the 13-second mark, the music abruptly shifts to the song 'Daddy' by PSY, specifically the lyrics 'I got it from my daddy' with a distinctive trumpet-led EDM hook. (4) Sound of wind and distant city noise is faintly audible in the outdoor segments but mostly covered by music.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '韓國爆紅「暴走天竺鼠舞」 台灣人 VS 韓國人' (Korean viral Guinea Pig dance, Taiwanese vs. Korean). (2) Decorative Text: '韓網爆紅的Challenge ? !' (Viral challenge on Korean web?!). (3) Decorative/Hook Text: 'OK!', '???', '韓國大媽走步?' (Korean aunties walking style?), '(放棄)' (Give up), '(笑死)' (Laughing to death), '(我真的是韓國人)' (I am really Korean), '感覺比較適合跳 PSY - 爹地' (Feels more suitable to dance to PSY - Daddy).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Failed dance attempt -> Humorous comparison -> Music shift and conclusion

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a humorous 'expectation vs. reality' take on a viral Korean dance challenge. The two creators attempt to mimic a trendy hip-shaking walk but realize their version looks more like elderly women walking than a dance move. They use comedic timing and visual comparisons (inserting a photo of 'aunties') to entertain the audience, concluding that their 'awkward' movement actually aligns perfectly with the choreography of PSY's song 'Daddy'.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long brown hair, dressed in a green and white 'Squid Game' style tracksuit numbered 456, sits on a bed and frantically tries to open a black gift box with a pink ribbon. (2) She uses various colorful magnetic keys (red, blue, green) to try and slide out drawers on the side of the box, showing expressions of intense frustration and comedic desperation. (3) After several failed attempts and even mock-slapping the box, it finally opens to reveal promotional cards and a lanyard. (4) The scene transitions to the woman in a hotel room at night, where she is shown mixing a large bowl of Bibimbap and eating it along with a plate of fruit, looking relieved and happy.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A high-pitched, excited female voice speaks rapidly in Korean and Chinese, accompanied by rhythmic, suspenseful drumming music reminiscent of the 'Squid Game' soundtrack. (2) Sound effects including sharp clicks, thuds, and digital 'error' sounds occur as she struggles with the box. (3) A second female voice (off-screen) is heard laughing and reacting to the creator's frustration. (4) The music transitions to a more relaxed, upbeat tempo as the sounds of slurping, chewing, and clinking spoons against a bowl dominate the final segment.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) POV: 不適合參加魷魚遊戲的人 (POV: People not suitable for Squid Game) - Decorative hook. (2) (Netflix送來的禮物) (Gift sent by Netflix) - Functional context. (3) 原來我們身分證夾上的磁鐵小飾品，其實是鑰匙啦！ (Turns out the magnetic accessories on our ID clips are actually keys!) - Explanatory narrative. (4) 半夜12:30才吃晚餐... 真的超級爽 (Eating dinner at 12:30 AM... really super satisfying) - Emotional vlog commentary.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro/Hook -> Chaotic Unboxing Struggle -> Successful Opening -> Late Night Meal Outro

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair is seen eating a large bowl of shredded carrots and then peeling a whole carrot in a kitchen setting. (2) The scene cuts to a close-up of her face where she touches her cheek, smiling and showing her smooth skin. (3) She holds a large jar of kimchi and eats some with chopsticks. (4) She returns to the large bowl of carrots, adding various ingredients like oil and seeds before eating them heartily. (5) Transition to a bedroom where she wakes up, jumps out of bed, and pulls a yellow smiley-face pouch out of her handbag. (6) She presents several small bottles of DR.WU collagen drinks. She demonstrates the unique 'top-cap and bottom-drink' design by opening a pink bottle, pouring the liquid onto a small plate, and then drinking one. (7) A side-by-side 'Before' and 'After' image compares the texture of her skin. (8) She showcases three different types of the product in their packaging (blue, yellow, and purple). (9) She holds up the pink bottle while talking to the camera, concluding with a shot of the product and text overlays.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, lo-fi background music with a steady electronic beat begins. A female voice speaks with a friendly, energetic, and high-pitched tone throughout. (2) Ambient sound of crunchy eating and the scraping of a carrot peeler is heard alongside the speech. (3) The music maintains a constant tempo as the speaker describes various foods and their benefits. (4) A slight 'pop' sound effect is heard when she opens the product bottle, followed by the faint sound of liquid pouring. (5) The female voice continues at a steady pace, concluding with an enthusiastic sign-off while the music fades out.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '這是減肥餐?' (Is this a diet meal?). Tone: Curios. (2) Decorative Text: '這是韓國女生的護膚秘密' (This is Korean girls' skincare secret). Tone: Informative. (3) Functional Text: '1. Kimchi', '2. 紅蘿蔔沙拉' (Carrot Salad), '3. 喝的保養品' (Drinkable skincare). Tone: Structured. (4) Brand Name: 'DR.WU 雙膠原勝肽飲'. Tone: Professional. (5) Effect Text: '上錠下飲' (Tablet on top, drink on bottom), '1+1>2'. Tone: Promotional. (6) Functional Text: 'Before' and 'After' on a skin comparison shot. Tone: Comparative. (7) Functional Text: 'Less is More 減法保養'. Tone: Philosophical/Instructional.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro eating routine -> Transition to product introduction -> Demonstration of usage -> Result comparison and variety showcase -> Summary.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman is seated in an indoor setting with a large spread of Korean fried chicken, rice, and kimchi in front of her. She begins by eating a large, crispy piece of chicken using chopsticks. (2) She transitions to eating methods, starting with a bite of plain white rice followed by chicken. (3) She then eats a piece of chicken topped with kimchi. (4) She holds a bottle of Buldak sauce to the camera, pours it over the chicken, and eats it. (5) Finally, she pours sesame oil from a yellow-capped tin onto her kimchi, mixes it, and consumes it with the remaining chicken and rice, frequently looking directly at the camera with satisfied expressions.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio is characterized by high-fidelity ASMR recording of crunchy chewing and swallowing sounds. No background music is present. (2) Soft clinking sounds of metal chopsticks hitting the plastic containers and a spoon scooping rice are clearly audible. (3) A distinct 'squelch' and 'squeeze' sound occurs as sauce is poured onto the chicken. (4) Towards the end of the video, the woman speaks briefly in a high-pitched, friendly Korean female voice. (5) The soundscape remains focused on the textures of the food throughout the duration.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '只有韓國人才會這樣吃炸雞? How Koreans Eat Chicken' - A curiosity-based hook in Traditional Chinese and English. (2) '頂級洋釀炸雞' - Descriptive functional text identifying the dish. (3) '1. 配白飯', '2. 白飯+Kimchi', '3. 火辣雞醬' - Sequential instructional text. (4) '韓國人真的會這樣吃!' - Emphatic hook text. (5) '(我的專屬吃法)' - Personal variety-style caption.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro Hook -> Sequential Demonstration of Eating Methods -> Personal Recommendation -> Outro

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young female with long dark hair, wearing a light pink cardigan, sits on a bed and talks directly to the camera with expressive facial gestures. (2) She holds up a pair of blue and white flip-flops, bending them to show flexibility, then moves on to discuss food while photos of elaborate Korean breakfast tables appear on the screen. (3) She transitions to showing a white glass bottle of Sulwhasoo serum, pointing at the label. (4) The scene shifts to a bathroom where she is seen applying the serum to her cheeks and forehead. (5) A split-screen comparison shows her facial skin 'Before' and 'After' use. (6) Finally, she holds the product while promotional text for a trial set appears.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A young female voice speaking Mandarin starts with a high-pitched, energetic tone accompanied by upbeat, rhythmic background music. (2) As she discusses specific habits, sharp sound effects like 'pops' and 'dings' punctuate the transitions of text on screen. (3) During the product demonstration, the vocal volume remains high and steady while the background music maintains a consistent tempo. (4) The video ends with a clear call to action delivered in a friendly, persuasive tone.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Hook text: '韓國人回不去了！被台化的3種習慣' (A Korean who can't go back! 3 habits of being Taiwanized), tone: energetic. (2) Numbered list items: '1. 愛上拖鞋' (Falling in love with slippers), '2. 早上不用煮菜' (No need to cook in the morning), '3. 化妝時間減少' (Reduced makeup time), tone: informative. (3) Product details: 'Sulwhasoo First Care Activating Serum VI', tone: professional. (4) Promotional offer: '$200元 14天體驗組' ($200 for 14-day trial set), tone: encouraging.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Personal cultural story -> Lifestyle habit list -> Skincare product demonstration -> Brand promotion

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a split-screen comparison: the left side shows another creator eating a yellow substance, while the main female creator on the right opens a beverage can and reacts with surprise. (2) She then unboxes a large styrofoam container containing a packaged raw fish liver and slices of sashimi. (3) She wipes the liver with paper towels to clean it and proceeds to cut it into smaller pieces using a yellow knife. (4) She tastes a piece of the raw liver after dipping it in a small bowl of salt and oil, followed by an expressive reaction of confusion and slight disgust. (5) She switches to eating the pink fish slices dipped in a red sauce, showing visible enjoyment and a more positive facial expression. (6) She attempts to eat the liver again, this time adding a spicy sauce on top. (7) The final scene shows her sitting on the floor, eating potato chips while a small white dog looks on.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat and energetic pop music with female vocals begins immediately. A female voice provides continuous Mandarin narration in an excited and curious tone. (2) The sounds of unboxing, plastic rustling, and the 'clack' of a knife against a plate are clear. (3) The audio shifts to include ASMR-style chewing sounds when the creator eats. (4) Vocalizations of surprise and soft laughter are heard alongside the background music. (5) In the final moments, the sound of a dog crunching on a snack replaces most of the narration.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Top title: '韓網爆紅神奇食材 黃金生鴨血?' (Korean internet viral magical ingredient: Golden raw duck blood?). (2) Hook text: '超多韓國網美生吃黃色的魚肝?!' (So many Korean internet celebrities eat yellow fish liver raw?!). (3) Decorative variety-show style text like '實驗歐膩' (Experimental Unnie), '感覺好奇怪' (Feels very strange), '混亂' (Confused), and '當機' (System crash/Frozen) appear to emphasize emotional reactions. (4) Continuous functional subtitles in Traditional Chinese translate the spoken narration.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro Hook -> Unboxing -> Preparation -> Tasting & Reaction -> Comparison -> Outro

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair and pinkish eye makeup speaks directly to the camera while smiling and gesturing. (2) Sequence of extreme close-ups on her lips: she applies a red base tint, dabs on cushion foundation to blur the edges, uses a lip liner for definition, and finally applies a glossy oil from a tube with a metal applicator. (3) She holds up the product tubes, shows color swatches on the back of her hand, and demonstrates the cooling metal applicator against her skin. A side-by-side 'Before' and 'After' comparison of her lip texture is shown. (4) The video ends with her blowing a kiss and holding the product.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-pitched, energetic female voice speaking Mandarin begins over a light, upbeat synth-pop background track. (2) The background music remains constant while the vocals shift into an instructional tone, describing specific steps. (3) The speaking pace increases slightly as the narrator lists product benefits; occasional 'sparkle' and 'pop' sound effects (SFX) are used to emphasize text pop-ups. (4) The audio fades out with a concluding friendly remark.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: Subtitles translating the speech. (2) Decorative/Hook Text: '最近小盒子整個被塞爆' (Inbox is stuffed), '韓國流行唇妝畫法來了' (Korean lip makeup trend is here), '無痛豐唇' (Painless lip plumping). (3) Instructional Text: Numbered steps from (1) to (5) detailing the application process. (4) Promotional/Content Text: 'ANNAEVERYDAY 蜜萃油', 'Made in Japan', '90% 的角鯊烷', '316L 不鏽鋼 SPA 頭', 'Vegan', 'Dermatest'.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Hook -> Step-by-step Tutorial -> Feature Breakdown -> Recommendation

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video is a live-action recording featuring a young woman standing in an indoor setting with a white wall and a light-colored wooden door. She is smiling and begins to move her body rhythmically as animated graphics of a paintbrush and bacon strips appear on the right side of the screen. (2) As the music continues, she performs a choreographed dance involving arm waves and hip movements. Additional graphics including a lime, a charcoal grill, sausages, bread, and a jar of sauce appear sequentially around her, floating in the air. (3) In the final phase, the food graphics merge over the animated grill with a fire effect to represent a cooking process. She finishes the dance by presenting graphics of mooncakes and pomelo slices, smiling and gesturing towards the 'finished' products.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy Brazilian funk music starts immediately with a heavy, rhythmic bassline and sharp percussion. (2) A male vocal enters with a rhythmic chanting style in Portuguese; dog bark sound effects (SFX) are heard in synchronization with the beat. (3) The upbeat music maintains its tempo and volume throughout the entire duration, with no ambient background noise detected.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '金蘭 烤肉醬' (Kimlan BBQ Sauce) appears on the label of the animated sauce jar graphic, presented in a neutral informative tone. (2) None. (3) None.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a young female creator expressing surprise, followed by shots of a seafood buffet featuring crab and mussels. (2) She transitions to an outdoor courtyard and then a restaurant setting, where she enjoys roast chicken and soup. (3) The scene shifts to the creator relaxing in various hot springs, including a public outdoor pool and a private indoor tub. (4) Night shots show her enjoying a luxury hotel room and a night-view balcony. (5) The next day, she visits a beer factory with colorful murals and then eats at a Cantonese restaurant, showing close-ups of crispy roast pork. (6) Finally, she walks through a scenic park with a red bridge and spots black swans in a pond, ending with a tourism logo animation.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Energetic, upbeat pop-style background music plays throughout. (2) A female voice speaks in an enthusiastic and friendly tone, narrating her experiences. (3) Occasional male voiceover provides context and transition details. (4) Ambient sounds are minimal, but there are crisp sound effects (SFX) such as a 'crunch' sound when eating crispy pork and 'bling' sounds for text appearing. (5) The music maintains a high tempo with a consistent beat that matches the fast-paced editing.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Hook text: '韓國人首次體驗!! 臺中溫泉吃到飽buffet' (Korean's first experience! Taichung hot spring buffet) in an excited tone. (2) Functional text: Locations are labeled such as '麒麟峰溫泉料理', '日光溫泉會館', and '清新溫泉飯店'. (3) Descriptive text: '口感Q嫩! 肉汁爆發!' (Q-tender texture! Juice explosion!) and '超豐富!' (Super rich!) used to emphasize food quality. (4) Decorative text: '2024-2025 TAIWAN 臺灣好湯' logo at the end for branding.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro Hook -> Food Montage -> Hot Spring Experience -> Hotel Stay -> Sightseeing -> Outro
